definition.en: Now the entity is in itself composed of such intensities.
definition.zh: 存有本身即由这样的强度所组成。

definition.en: Individual life, or the life of the present individual, could be legitimately compared to the dream of an entity.
definition.zh: 个体生命，或当前个体的生命，可以被合理地比作一个存有的梦。

definition.en: The soul or entity is always in a state of flux, or learning, and of developments that have to do with subjective experience rather than with time or space.
definition.zh: 灵魂或存有始终处于流动、学习与发展的状态，这些发展与主观经验有关，而非与时间或空间有关。

definition.en: Think of the greater you -- call it the entity if you want to -- as forming a psychic structure quite as real as your physical one, but composed of many selves.
definition.zh: 将更大的你——若你愿意，称之为存有——视为形成一个与你的物质结构同样真实的心理结构，但由许多自我组成。

definition.en: The entity is concerned with these years in the same manner that you are concerned with your dreams.
definition.zh: 存有对这些年岁的关切，正如你对自己梦境的关切一样。

explanation:
实体是超越个体人格的更大意识结构，由无数“强度点”构成，如同巨人般散布在宇宙中，其边界内包含众多行星和星辰——这些代表“时刻点”。个体生命如同实体的一场梦：人经历的数十年对实体而言只是瞬间，实体像你关注梦境一样关注这些人格，给予方向与组织，并从中获得洞察与满足。

一个实体可以同时投射多个肉身人格，甚至在不同时代以不同身份出现（如施洗约翰和基督故事中的某些人格）。这些人格是实体的分支，彼此独立却属于同一整体。实体意识过于强大，无法完全装入一个物理载体，因此需要多样化环境来体验。

实体本身无性别，但可能更认同某种特质。人格无法直接抵达实体，但可通过内在感官与实体沟通。实体没有边界，

quotes.text: Now. As I have told you, there is duration of a kind. What would correspond, in any case, to your idea of duration within the spacious present ; it is a matter of intensities however. Now the entity is in itself composed of such intensities. Simply for the sake of analogy, imagine the image, a humanoid one, of an entity giant-sized, spread out anywhere in your physical universe. And if the image were projected against a midnight sky, within its apparent boundaries then you would see a multitude of planets and stars. Let these represent moment points. On one hand they are a part of the entity, as your cells are a portion of your body. On the other hand the entity's consciousness can travel through these. They are doorways within his own psychological makeup, into experiences.
quotes.translation: 现在。正如我曾告诉你的，存在一种持续性。无论如何，在广袤的当下中，与你们对持续性的概念相对应的东西，其实是强度的问题。而存有本身正是由这样的强度所构成。仅以类比而言，想象一个巨人尺寸的类人存有形象，散布在你们物质宇宙的任何地方。如果这个形象投射在午夜的天空中，在其明显的边界内，你们会看到无数行星和恒星。让这些代表瞬间点。一方面，它们是存有的一部分，如同你们的细胞是身体的一部分。另一方面，存有的意识可以穿越这些瞬间点。它们是他自身心理结构中的门户，通往各种体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Individual life, or the life of the present individual, could be legitimately compared to the dream of an entity. While the individual suffers and enjoys his given number of years, these years are but a flash to the entity. The entity is concerned with these years in the same manner that you are concerned with your dreams. As you give inner purpose and organization to your dreams, and as you obtain insight and satisfaction from your dreams though they involve only a part of your life, so the entity to some extent directs and gives purpose and organization to his personalities during their existence. And so does the entity obtain insights and satisfactions from his existing personalities, although no one takes up all of his own attentions.
quotes.translation: 个体生命，或当前个体的生命，可以合理地比作存有的一个梦。当个体经历并享受其给定的岁月时，这些岁月对存有而言不过是一闪而过。存有关心这些岁月的方式，如同你们关心自己的梦。正如你们赋予梦内在的目的和组织，并从梦中获得洞见和满足——尽管梦只涉及你们生活的一部分——存有也在某种程度上引导、赋予其人格在存在期间以目的和组织。同样地，存有也从其存在的人格中获得洞见和满足，尽管没有一个人格能占据他全部的关注。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It made no difference to your history. The three men were part of one entity, gaining physical existence in one time. They were not born at the same date however. There are reasons why the entity did not return as one person. For one thing the full consciousness of an entity would be too strong for one physical vehicle. For another the entity wanted a more diversified environment than could otherwise be provided. The entity was born once as John the Baptist, and then he was born in two other forms. One of these is a personality that most stories of Christ refer to.
quotes.translation: 这对你们的历史毫无影响。这三个人是同一个存有的一部分，在同一时间获得物质存在。然而他们并非出生于同一日期。存有没有以一个人的身份返回是有原因的。其一，存有的完整意识对单一物质载具来说过于强大。其二，存有想要一个比原本所能提供的更多样化的环境。这个存有一次降生为施洗约翰，然后又以另外两种形式降生。其中一个人格是大多数基督故事所指涉的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: (From the 58th session for June 1, 1964:) Ruburt and myself are offshoots of the same entity. The difference in time is but a camouflage distortion. The entity was a particularly strong one, and many of its egos have made the decision to turn into entities ... And now, my dear patient Joseph, may I tell you that you are also part of that same entity -- and this is one of the reasons why I am able to communicate with you both.
quotes.translation: （摘自1964年6月1日第58节课：）鲁柏和我是同一个存有的分支。时间差异不过是一种伪装扭曲。这个存有特别强大，它的许多自我已决定转化为存有……现在，我亲爱的耐心约瑟，容我告诉你，你也是同一个存有的一部分——这就是我能够与你们两人沟通的原因之一。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Entities, if they prefer, and under various conditions, when they become acquainted with others, may introduce to each other if they so prefer, various portions of their personalities. These various portions will be able to help each other and to aid in development. Take for example entity A and entity B. Self A personality of entity A may get along quite nicely with B's self B. As self 2 and B's self 2 may not get along well at all, so the entities will shift to those personalities which have the greatest rapport, and use them to establish a relationship.
quotes.translation: 存有们，如果他们愿意，在各种条件下，当他们结识其他存有时，可以依其偏好向对方介绍自己人格的各个部分。这些不同的部分将能够互相帮助，促进发展。以存有A和存有B为例。存有A的自我A人格可能与存有B的自我B相处得相当融洽。而自我2和B的自我2可能完全合不来，因此存有们会转向那些最具共鸣的人格，并用它们来建立关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The whole self slowly regains knowledge of its own reincarnations, and learns of its relationship to its own entity. I have said that a personality may become another entity. There is no rule against it. It is a matter of inherent strength and ability and also of desire. Many personalities upon receiving knowledge of their entity prefer to remain part of it, though they are always independent individualities within the whole entity, as even the cells of your physical bodies are part of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 整个自我逐渐重新获得对其自身转世的知识，并了解自己与所属存有的关系。我曾说过，一个人格可能成为另一个存有。这并无规则禁止。这关乎内在的力量、能力，以及欲望。许多人格在得知自己所属的存有后，宁愿继续作为其一部分，尽管他们在整个存有中始终是独立的个体，正如你们物质身体的细胞也是整个自我的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Many so-called cases of possession can be laid to this alone. The dominant personality can be likened on your plane to the dominant entity. Please understand that I am using an analogy here. As the personality on your plane actually changes, expands and grows according to its potentialities, as it presents at various times varied images to the world, such as--if you'll excuse me for using clichés--a smiling face, a sorrowful face, but is still basically the same personality, so on another level does the entity present at various times a varied appearance and speak in a different voice. As the smiling and the sorrowful face also express and expand the personality, so too do the various reincarnated personalities express and expand the entity as a whole.
quotes.translation: 许多所谓的附身案例都可归因于此。主导人格在你们的层面上就如同主导存有。请理解我在此使用的是类比。正如你们层面上的人格实际上会根据其潜能改变、扩展和成长，在不同时期向世界呈现不同的形象——请原谅我使用陈词滥调——比如笑脸、愁容，但本质上仍是同一个人格；同样在另一个层面上，存有在不同时期会呈现不同的面貌，用不同的声音说话。正如笑脸和愁容也表达并扩展了人格，各种转世人格也同样表达并扩展了存有整体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You are silly sometimes, Joseph. For shame. From the information you have been given before, and from the above paragraph, you should know that you are in contact with your own entities, in that the mind is a portion of the entity to begin with. I have told you that communication between a present personality and the entity is carried on by means of the inner senses, and I have told you that in these sessions you use the inner senses. Surely then the question answers itself.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，你们有时很傻。真不害臊。根据你们之前获得的信息以及上述段落，你们应该知道你们正在与自己的存有接触，因为心灵本就是存有的一部分。我曾告诉你们，当前人格与存有之间的沟通是通过内在感官进行的，我也告诉过你们，在这些课中你们使用了内在感官。那么这个问题自然就迎刃而解了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The present personality cannot travel to the complete entity, again because of these very real laws; that is, while caught in or under the influence of the field of your plane, the personality cannot travel to the entity. The personality can and should be aware of the whole self of which it is a part, and that part of the whole self which the ego ignores, is the one part which can enter into the field influence of the entity, though it cannot travel to the entity itself.
quotes.translation: 当前人格无法旅行到完整的存有，同样是因为这些非常真实的法则；也就是说，当人格被困在你们层面的场域中或受其影响时，它无法旅行到存有。人格能够且应该意识到它作为其中一部分的整体自己，而自我所忽略的整体自己的那一部分，正是能够进入存有场域影响的那一部分，尽管它无法旅行到存有本身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Loren was 3 times a man. The overall impression of the 3 existing personalities is nevertheless female, for the reasons that I have explained. Sex, regardless of all your fleshy tales, is a psychic phenomenon, merely certain qualities which you called male and female. The qualities however are real, and permeate other planes as well as your own. They are opposites which are nevertheless complementary and which merge into one. When I say as I have that the overall entity is neither male or female, and yet refer to various entities such as Joseph and Ruburt, which are definitely male names, I merely mean that in the overall essence the entity refers or identifies itself more with male characteristics, or so-called male characteristics, than with the female.
quotes.translation: 洛伦曾三次为男性。然而这三个现存人格的整体印象却是女性，原因我已解释过。性别，无论你们有多少肉欲故事，都是一种心灵现象，仅仅是你们称之为男性和女性的某些特质。但这些特质是真实的，并渗透到其他层面以及你们自己的层面。它们是互补的对立面，最终融合为一。当我像之前那样说整体存有既非男性也非女性，却又提到约瑟和鲁柏等明确为男性名字的存有时，我仅仅是指，在整体本质中，存有更倾向于认同男性特征或所谓的男性特征，而非女性特征。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This designation does not include the entity as a whole, however. The personality does have access to the entity, but the personality does not contain the entity. In other words the whole self as it exists on your plane does not contain the entity, although communication between the entity and the whole self can and does take place by means of the inner senses.
quotes.translation: 然而，这种指称并不涵盖存有整体。人格确实能够接触到存有，但人格并不包含存有。换句话说，存在于你们层面上的整体自己并不包含存有，尽管存有与整体自己之间可以通过内在感官进行沟通，而且确实在进行。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Think of the greater you -- call it the entity if you want to -- as forming a psychic structure quite as real as your physical one, but composed of many selves. As each cell of your body has its position within your corporeal space and boundaries, so each self within the entity is aware of its own "time" and dimension of activity. The body is a temporal structure. The cells, however, while a part of this body, are not aware of the entire dimension in which your consciousness dwells. They do not perceive all of the elements that are available even in three-dimensional experience, yet your present consciousness -- seemingly so much more sophisticated -- physically rests upon cellular awareness.
quotes.translation: 把那个更大的你——如果你愿意称之为存有——想象成一个心灵结构，它和你的物质结构一样真实，但由许多自己组成。正如你身体的每个细胞在你肉体空间和边界内都有其位置，存有中的每个自己也都意识到自己活动的"时间"和维度。身体是一个时间性结构。然而，细胞虽然是身体的一部分，却意识不到你的意识所栖居的整个维度。它们甚至无法感知三维经验中可用的所有元素，而你当前看似复杂得多的意识，在物质层面上却依赖于细胞的觉知。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is only because you have a highly limited conception of your own entity that you insist upon its being almost sterile in its singularity. There are millions of cells within your body, but you call your body a unit, and consider it your own. You do form it, from the inside out, and yet you form it from living substance, and each smallest particle has its own living consciousness. There are clumps of matter, and in that respect there are clumps of consciousness, each individual, with their own destiny and abilities and potentials. There are no limitations to your own entity: therefore, how can your entity or soul have boundaries, for boundaries would enclose it and deny it freedom.
quotes.translation: 只因你对自己存有的认知极度受限，才坚持认为其独特性近乎贫瘠。你体内的细胞数以百万计，却将身体称为一个单位，视作己有。你确实由内而外地塑造它，却用活生生的物质塑造它，每个最微小的粒子都有其自身的活意识。存在物质团块，就此而言也存在意识团块，每个个体都有其自身的命运、能力与潜能。你的存有无任何限制：因此，你的存有或灵魂怎能有边界？因为边界会将其禁锢，剥夺其自由。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: All possible entities that can ever be actualized always exist. They [have] always existed and they always will exist. All That Is must, by its characteristics, be all that it can ever be, and so there can be no end to existence--and, in those terms, no beginning. But in terms of your world the units of consciousness, acting both as forces and as psychological entities of massive power, planted the seeds of your world in a dimension of imaginative power that gave birth to physical form. In your terms those entities are your ancestors--and yet [they are] not yours alone, but the ancestors of all the consciousnesses that make up your world.
quotes.translation: 所有可能被实现的存在永远存在。它们过去一直存在，将来也永远存在。一切万有，凭其特性，必须成为它所能成为的一切，因此存在不可能有终点——用那些术语来说，也不可能有起点。但就你们的世界而言，意识单位既作为力量，也作为具有巨大力量的心理存有，在想象力的维度中播下了你们世界的种子，从而孕育出物质形态。用你们的说法，那些存有是你们的祖先——然而它们并非你们独有，而是构成你们世界的所有意识的祖先。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Here we have Roarck's overall entity, laughing with mirth but also with compassion, for while the entity enjoys all that is, the personalities have often turned their backs upon very much, in order to pursue esthetic purpose. At another time we will go into this more deeply, but Roarck recognized the picture, and subconsciously saw himself. In many ways he and Mark have opposing personalities, and yet basically the entities are similar to some startling degree.
quotes.translation: 这里我们有罗亚克的整体存有，既带着欢愉也带着慈悲在笑，因为当存有享受一切时，人格们却常常为了追求审美目的而背弃了许多。改天我们会更深入探讨这一点，但罗亚克认出了那幅画，并在潜意识中看到了自己。在许多方面，他和马克拥有对立的人格，然而从根本上说，这两个存有相似到惊人的程度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Nevertheless, when you think in terms of the entity and its various personality manifestations throughout your earth time then you realize that the basic self, the entity, cannot be destroyed in any particular earth life. You are, I know, acquainted with the idea of regeneration. If you will imagine the various reincarnated personalities--and this is a most unpleasant analogy--as the various limbs and other faculties of the entity, then you will see why if one fragment is disintegrated it can be regenerated in the same manner that a physical cell of your body can be regenerated.
quotes.translation: 然而，当你以存有及其在你们地球时间中的各种人格显现来思考时，你就会明白基本自我、即存有，在任何特定的地球生命中都无法被摧毁。我知道，你熟悉再生的概念。如果你将各种转世人格——这是一个极不愉快的类比——想象为存有的各种肢体和其他官能，那么你就会明白，为什么如果一个碎片瓦解了，它可以像你身体的一个物理细胞那样被再生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. At some point you, Joseph, and Ruburt and myself, are part of the same entity. This entity is that synthesization that Dunne did not foresee, but it in no way implies a loss of individual identities. This is extremely difficult to explain, since when I use the word individual identity, I am not referring primarily to egotistical identity alone. As a matter of fact, I am in one way, and in one way only, a future self--this is extremely simplified--of Ruburts; that could be compared I suppose to a theoretical number twelve self, according to Dunne.
quotes.translation: 现在。在某个层面上，你，约瑟夫，还有鲁柏和我，是同一个存有的一部分。这个存有是邓恩未能预见的那种综合，但它绝不意味着个体身份的丧失。这极难解释，因为当我使用“个体身份”这个词时，我主要并非仅指自我身份。事实上，在一种意义上，且仅在一种意义上，我是鲁柏的一个未来自我——这被极度简化了；我想，根据邓恩的说法，这可以比作一个理论上的第十二号自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I tell you this, and at the same time remind you that your present personality is never lost. Now another word for the soul is entity. You see it is not a simple matter of giving you a definition of a soul or entity, for even to have a glimpse in logical terms you would have to understand it in spiritual, psychic, and electromagnetic terms, and understand the basic nature of consciousness and action as well. But you can intuitively discover the nature of the soul or entity, and in many ways intuitive knowledge is superior to any other kind.
quotes.translation: 我告诉你这些，同时提醒你，你当前的人格永远不会丧失。现在，灵魂的另一个词就是存有。你看，给你一个灵魂或存有的定义并非简单之事，因为即使要在逻辑术语中窥见一斑，你也必须从灵性、心灵和电磁的角度去理解它，并且理解意识与行动的基本本质。但你可以凭直觉发现灵魂或存有的本质，而在许多方面，直觉知识优于任何其他知识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Such personalities will concentrate their main activities in such a way that they can best affect conceptual thought, and bring about necessary changes. Many large families are representative of this group. They appear and reappear in your histories, always as dominant and significant entities. Here the family represents an entity who has taken upon itself the nurturing of your civilization. Knowing intuitively those changes which must come about in your future, they try to bring them about by appearing in your past; though to them your future and the past are the same they must still work within probabilities, you see, and what they are doing is affecting probabilities within your system. Even your time is basically plastic, though it does not seem so to you.
quotes.translation: 这类人格会以最能影响概念性思维并带来必要改变的方式集中其主要活动。许多大家族正是这一群体的代表。他们在你们的历史中反复出现，始终作为主导性的重要存有。在此，家族代表着一个承担起培育你们文明责任的存有。他们凭直觉预知你们未来必然发生的变化，便试图通过出现在你们的过去来促成这些变化；尽管对他们而言，你们的未来与过去是同一回事，但他们仍须在概率中运作，而他们所做的正是在你们系统内影响概率。即便你们的时间本质上也是可塑的，尽管在你们看来并非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... True order and organization, even of biological structure, can be achieved only by granting a basic unpredictability. I am aware that this sounds startling. Basically, however, the motion of any wave or particle or entity is unpredictable -- freewheeling and undetermined. Your life structure is a result of that unpredictability. Your psychological structure is also. However, because you are presented with a fairly cohesive picture, in which certain laws seem to apply, you think that the laws come first and physical reality follows. Instead, the cohesive picture is the result of the unpredictable nature that is and must be basic to all energy.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻……真正的秩序与组织，即便是生物结构的秩序与组织，唯有通过赋予基本的不确定性才能实现。我知道这听起来令人震惊。然而，任何波、粒子或存有的运动本质上都是不可预测的——自由运转且未受决定的。你们的生命结构正是这种不确定性的结果。你们的心理结构亦然。然而，由于你们眼前呈现出一幅相当连贯的画面，其中某些法则似乎适用，你们便以为法则先于物质实相而存在。实则，那连贯的画面正是不可预测性的结果——这种不可预测性是一切能量的根本属性。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 681
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: (Seth's entity, who is nameless in our terms, spoke this evening, rather than Seth. See the 464th session for February 10, 1969; this is the last time this entity spoke to us. Seth's entity hasn't spoken many times; the 464th session and earlier ones contain detailed notes as to the manner of speaking used by the entity, etc.
quotes.translation: （赛斯的存有——以我们的说法是无名的——今晚发言，而非赛斯本人。参见1969年2月10日的第464节；这是该存有最后一次对我们说话。赛斯的存有发言次数不多；第464节及更早的章节中载有关于该存有说话方式的详细记录等。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Since all entities had a hand in when the first particle of matter came into physical materialization, then the inference is plain that entities not yet born upon your planet somehow existed then, and this is the case. You are familiar I am sure with the old religious Christian dictum that God always was and always will be, and this is considered a religious mystery. The fact is that entities always were and always will be, though not necessarily in the same form.
quotes.translation: 既然所有存有都参与了物质第一粒子进入物理具现化的过程，那么显而易见的推论是：尚未在你们星球诞生的存有在彼时已然存在，事实正是如此。我相信你们熟悉古老的基督教教条——上帝始终存在且将永远存在，这被视为宗教奥秘。事实上，存有始终存在且将永远存在，尽管未必以相同的形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The soul or entity is always in a state of flux, or learning, and of developments that have to do with subjective experience rather than with time or space. This is not nearly as mysterious as it might sound. Each of my readers plays a game in which the egotistical conscious self pretends not to know what the whole self definitely does know. Since the ego is definitely a part of the whole self, then it must necessarily be basically aware of such knowledge. In its intense focus in physical reality, however, it pretends not to know, until it feels able to utilize the information in physical terms.
quotes.translation: 灵魂或存有始终处于流变、学习与发展的状态，这些发展关乎主观经验，而非时间或空间。这远非听起来那般神秘。我的每位读者都在玩一场游戏：自我意识假装不知道整体自我确知的一切。既然自我无疑是整体自我的一部分，那么它必然在根本上知晓此类知识。然而，由于它极度聚焦于物质实相，便假装不知，直到它感觉能够以物质形式运用这些信息为止。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Ruburt and myself were offshoots of the same entity, as I have mentioned. I will mention now that we have chosen the same paths. The difference in time is but a camouflage distortion. The entity was a particularly strong one, and many of its egos have made the decision to turn into entities.
quotes.translation: 如我曾提及，鲁柏与我是同一存有的分支。我现在要说明，我们选择了相同的路径。时间差异不过是伪装扭曲。该存有格外强大，其许多自我已做出转化为存有的决定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: If you say that the personality cannot take any choice of which the entity is not aware, then this is true; but it is also true that the entity is utterly incapable of changing that choice made by the personality, even though the entity knows about the choice ahead of time, so to speak.
quotes.translation: 若说人格无法做出存有不知晓的任何选择，这固然属实；但同样真实的是，存有完全无法改变人格所做的选择，即便存有可以说事先已知晓该选择。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In terms of personality as you understand it, the individual chooses the abilities he or she will have, and the life challenges. In the present then each person has unlimited opportunity to draw upon the entity's energy, and the understanding and powers of all of its parts. (Long pause.) It goes without saying that any human being possesses the latent ability shown by a great artist or athlete, or statesman or philosopher. Within creaturehood there are wide ranges of abilities; these may be seldom used, but they are there as practical ideals that can be expressed within that system. In the same way, every individual possesses the abilities of its entity in latent form. These too serve as practical ideals, but in a different kind of context, for you have other centuries to play with and many existences instead of one.
quotes.translation: 就你所理解的人格而言，个体选择自己将拥有的能力与人生挑战。因此在当下，每个人都有无限机会汲取存有的能量，以及其所有组成部分的理解与力量。（长停顿）不言而喻，任何人类都潜藏着伟大艺术家、运动员、政治家或哲学家所展现的能力。在生物性中存在着广泛的能力范畴；这些能力虽鲜少被运用，却作为可在此系统内实现的实践理想而存在。同样地，每个个体都以潜在形式拥有其存有的能力。这些同样作为实践理想，但处于不同的脉络中，因为你有其他世纪可供挥洒，且拥有多次存在而非仅此一次。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The entities, or units of consciousness--those ancient fragments that burst into objectivity from the vast and infinite psychological realms of All That Is--dared all, for they joyfully abandoned themselves in space and time. They created new psychological entities, opened up an area of divine creativity that "until then" had been closed, and therefore to that [degree] extended the experience and immense existence of All That Is. For in so abandoning themselves they were not of course abandoned, since they contained within themselves their inherent relationship with All That Is. In those terms All That Is became physical also, aroused at its divine depth by the thrusting of each grass blade through the soil into the air, aroused by each birth and by each moment of each creature's existence.
quotes.translation: 存有或意识单位——那些从"一切万有"浩瀚无垠的心理领域迸发进入客观性的古老碎片——敢于挑战一切，因它们欢欣地将自身抛入时空之中。它们创造了新的心理存有，开辟了"此前"一直封闭的神圣创造力领域，从而在某种程度上扩展了"一切万有"的经验与浩瀚存在。因为在如此抛却自身的过程中，它们当然未被遗弃，因它们自身便蕴含着与"一切万有"的固有联系。就那些术语而言，"一切万有"也变成了物质性的，在其神圣深处被每片草叶刺穿土壤进入空气的冲劲所唤醒，被每个诞生以及每个生物存在的每个瞬间所唤醒。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The portrait is of Joseph and Ruburt. These are not portraits of yourselves as past personalities in your terms, or of particular re-incarnational selves. They are pictorial representatives of the whole selves that you are. In your terms the selves that are the sum of your re-incarnational personalities. These whole selves then are a part of your entity. Your probable selves are also a part of your entity, however. If you want to think in terms of guides, in quotes "angels," then you have the reality behind those terms. Ruburt and Joseph are the names I use for you, for these names themselves imply your greater goals. These personalities are aware of your present existence, and give you advice when you are in the sleep state. They are a source of strength. You can draw upon their knowledge, and you can also draw upon the knowledge of your own re-incarnational selves, past, in quotes, and future.
quotes.translation: 这幅肖像是约瑟和鲁柏。就你们的说法而言，这些并非你们作为过去人格的肖像，也不是特定转世自我的肖像。它们是你们所是的整体自我的图像化代表。按你们的说法，这些自我是你们转世人格的总和。然而这些整体自我是你们存有的一部分。你们的可能自我也是存有的一部分。若你们想以指导灵、引号中的"天使"来思考，那么你们便拥有这些术语背后的实相。鲁柏和约瑟是我用来称呼你们的名字，因为这些名字本身暗示着你们更伟大的目标。这些人格知晓你们当前的存在，并在你们处于睡眠状态时给予建议。它们是力量的源泉。你们可以汲取它们的知识，也可以汲取自己引号中"过去"与"未来"转世自我的知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There is also a corresponding, but lesser, self-consciousness that connects your present personalities with the dream world, which is aware of its origin and communicates data from you to it. Again you are no more aware of your dream creations, and no less aware than your entity is of you, but in the last analysis you are aware and connected with your entity through this self-conscious part of you that faces another plane.
quotes.translation: 还存在一种相应但较次要的自我意识，它连接你们当前人格与梦境世界，知晓自身起源，并将数据从你们传递至梦境世界。同样地，你们对梦境创造的知晓程度，既不比存有对你们的知晓更多，也不更少，但归根结底，你们通过自身面向另一层面的这一自我意识部分，与存有相连并知晓彼此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: （In the 54th session Seth went into considerable detail in explaining the construction of entities. He could not give us this information earlier, he said, because we would have leaped to the conclusion that he was Ruburt's [Janes] subconscious mind; this is not so. As everything else does, entities constantly change. To quote Seth: "Ruburt is not myself now, in his present life; he is nevertheless an extension and materialization of the Seth that I was at one time... He grew, evolved and expanded in terms of a particular, personal set of value fulfillments... He is now an actual gestalt, a personality that was one of the probable personalities into which Seth could grow. I represent another, I am another. "
quotes.translation: （在第54节课中，赛斯详细解释了存有的构造。他说之前无法提供这些信息，因为我们会贸然断定他是鲁柏[简]的潜意识；事实并非如此。如同其他一切事物，存有也在不断变化。引用赛斯的话："鲁柏在今生并非现在的我；但他是我曾是的赛斯的一个延伸与物质化……他在特定个人价值完成的范畴内成长、演化与扩展……他现在是一个实际完形，一个曾属于赛斯可能发展出的可能人格之一。我代表另一个，我是另一个。"）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is energy concentrated to a degree quite unbelievable to you. It contains potentials unlimited, but it must work out its own identity and form its own worlds. It carries within it the burden of all being. Within it are personality potentials beyond your comprehension. Remember, this is your own soul or entity I am speaking of, as well as soul or entity in general. You are one manifestation of your own soul. How many of you would want to limit your reality, your entire reality, to the experience you now know? You do this when you imagine that your present self is your entire personality, or insist that your identity be maintained unchanged through an endless eternity.
quotes.translation: 这是一种能量凝聚到你们难以置信的程度。它包含无限的潜能，但必须发展出自己的身份并形成自己的世界。它承载着所有存在的重担。其中蕴含着超越你们理解的人格潜能。请记住，我所说的正是你们自己的灵魂或存有，以及普遍意义上的灵魂或存有。你们是自己灵魂的一种显化。你们当中有多少人愿意将自己的实相——全部的实相——局限在当下所知的体验中？当你们想象现在的自己就是完整的人格，或坚持自己的身份必须在无尽的永恒中保持不变时，你们正是在这样做。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Entities or souls, in other words, send out portions of themselves to open up avenues of reality that would not exist otherwise. (Long pause at 9:39.) The three-dimensional selves, in existing within these realities, must focus their attention there completely. An inner awareness gives them a source of energy and strength. They must, however, come to understand their roles as actors, "finally" from their roles, and through another act of comprehension, return to the entity.
quotes.translation: 换言之，存有或灵魂会派出自身的一部分，去开拓那些否则便不会存在的实相途径。（9点39分长暂停）三维自我存在于这些实相中时，必须将注意力完全集中于此。内在觉知为它们提供能量与力量的源泉。然而，它们必须理解自己作为演员的角色，"最终"从角色中抽离，并通过另一层领悟回归存有。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Each reader, being presently ensconced within a physical form, I presume (humorously), knows only a small portion of himself -- as I mentioned earlier. The entity is the overall identity of which his personality is one manifestation -- an independent and eternally valid portion. In these communications, therefore, Ruburt's consciousness expands, and yet focuses in a different dimension, a dimension between his reality and mine, a field relatively free of distraction. Here I impress certain concepts upon him, with his permission and assent. They are not neutral, in that all knowledge or information bears the stamp of the personality who holds it or passes it on.
quotes.translation: 我猜想（幽默地）每位读者目前都安坐于肉身之中，只认识自己的一小部分——正如我先前所述。存有是整体身份，而人格是其一种显化——一个独立且永恒有效的部分。因此在这些通讯中，鲁柏的意识既扩展又聚焦于另一个维度——介于他的实相与我的实相之间的场域，一个相对不受干扰的领域。在此，我经他允许与同意，将某些概念烙印于他。这些概念并非中立，因为所有知识或信息都带有持有或传递它的人格的印记。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: They are fields within fields. In our discussion of fifth dimension, I mentioned how the vitality of the universe changes in different planes while it actually makes up the planes at the same time. In this manner also the so-called whole self and entity are connected, in this case by many diverse patterns, the inner senses being composed of the same elements of which the entity itself is composed.
quotes.translation: 它们是场域中的场域。在我们讨论第五维度时，我曾提及宇宙的生命力如何在不同的层面中变化，同时实际构成这些层面。同样地，所谓的整体自我与存也以这种方式相连——在此通过许多不同的模式，内在感官由构成存有本身的相同元素组成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: All of this happens through the window of your present. In terms of energy, again, the vitality of your entity impinging into three-dimensional reality forms a particle that is your present being. But this particle is also deflected away from the earth in a rhythmic pattern. The same happens to other portions of your self at other points in the space-time continuum, but at certain intervals you meet, so to speak. Each of your "presents" becomes charged, filled with potentiality; and your entity, itself conscious energy, is also enriched by your various experiences, by the combined and magnified power of its own "past."
quotes.translation: 这一切都通过你们当下的窗口发生。就能量而言，你们存有的生命力冲击三维实相，形成一个粒子——即你们当下的存在。但这个粒子也会以节律模式偏离地球。你们自我的其他部分在时空连续体的其他点上也发生同样情况，但可以说，在特定间隔中你们会相遇。你们每个"当下"都变得充满潜能、充满可能性；而你们的存有——本身即意识能量——也因你们各种经验、因自身"过去"被组合与放大的力量而更加丰富。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Channels, psychological and psychic, always exist, sending communications back and forth through the various levels of the self, and the ego accepts necessary information and data from inner portions of the personality without question. Its position in fact depends in a large manner upon this unquestioning acceptance of inner data. The ego, in other words, the "exterior" self that you think of as your self -- that portion of you maintains its safety and its seeming command precisely because inner layers of your own personality constantly uphold it, keep the physical body operating, and maintain communications with the multitudinous stimuli that come both from outside conditions and inside conditions. The soul or entity is not diminished but expanded through reincarnations, through existence and experience in probable realities -- something that I will explain later.
quotes.translation: 心理与灵性的通道始终存在，在自我的各个层面之间来回传递通讯。自我毫无质疑地接受来自人格内在部分的必要信息与数据。事实上，它的地位在很大程度上依赖于这种对内在数据的无质疑接受。换言之，自我——你们视为自己的"外在"自我——它之所以能维持安全与表面上的掌控，正是因为你们人格的内在层次不断支持它、维持身体运作，并与来自外在条件与内在条件的无数刺激保持通讯。灵魂或存有不会因转世、因在可能实相中的存在与经验而减少，反而会扩展——这一点我稍后会解释。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The deeply and strongly dimensioned sphere I used as an analogy for an action, if you recall, for any portion of action; you can now indeed further imagine one entity being composed of such an action, with egos like many faces looking outward in all directions, and each perceiving vastly different fields of reality; looking inward and outward, backward and forward as it were, through and beyond. And yet each action, or entity, is a part of another, and is both within and without another. And none of it is meaningless, and yet in a basic manner all of it has the meaning that you give it.
quotes.translation: 我曾用那个深邃而强烈的维度球体来比喻行动——如果你还记得的话——任何行动的一部分；现在你确实可以进一步想象，一个存有正是由这样的行动所构成，其自我如同许多面孔，向所有方向向外张望，每个都感知到截然不同的实相领域；向内向外、前后上下地张望，仿佛穿透并超越一切。然而每个行动或存有，都是另一个的一部分，既在另一个之内，又在另一个之外。这一切都非无意义，然而从根本上说，这一切都具有你赋予它的意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The entity is the sum of these layers, having all of this knowledge at conscious command at all times. Yet though I speak of them as one beneath the other they are not actually so, and I speak only for convenience. They are in all places, intertwined with paths leading from one to the other and with the echo of the entity's voice resounding through each interconnecting corridor.
quotes.translation: 存有是这些层次的集合，始终有意识地掌握着所有这些知识。尽管我将它们描述为层层相叠，但实际上并非如此，我只是为了方便才这样说。它们存在于所有地方，彼此交织，路径相互连通，存有的声音回响在每条互联的走廊中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is not however at all physical in your terms... And so here I suppose we will run into a block. The physical human form is extremely important to all entities, and they retain its idea shape for a long while. Again I will have more to say about the idea shape, which is somewhat like the physical genes and the blueprint, only on a different manifestation level. I believe, though I am not positive, that this human idea shape vanishes at some point and changes into another that is somehow more fitting and ideal. The entity in itself may only be a part of something else.
quotes.translation: 然而它完全不是你们所说的物质形态……所以我想我们在这里会遇到障碍。人类的物质形态对所有存有都极为重要，它们会在很长一段时间内保留其理念形态。关于理念形态，我稍后会有更多说明，它有点像物质基因和蓝图，只是处于不同的显化层面。我相信——尽管我不确定——这种人类的理念形态会在某个时刻消失，转变为另一种更合适、更理想的形态。存有本身可能只是其他某物的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There exists infinities of diversity and opportunity for the personalities, and this diversity is given to it, to it meaning the personality, by the entity. Your own dreams are fragments, even as in a much larger sense you are fragments of your entity. An unrecognized unity and organization lies within all of your dreams, beneath their diversity. And your dreams, while part of you, actually exist apart. That is, you have given them a certain independence. This is difficult to explain clearly, and may be rather difficult for you to swallow whole. I hope you don't choke.
quotes.translation: 人格拥有无限的多样性和机会，这种多样性是由存有赋予它——即人格——的。你自己的梦是碎片，就像在更大的意义上你是你存有的碎片一样。一种未被认知的统一和组织存在于你所有的梦中，潜藏于它们的多样性之下。而你的梦，虽然是你的一部分，实际上却独立存在。也就是说，你赋予了它们某种独立性。这很难解释清楚，对你来说可能相当难以全盘接受。希望你不会噎着。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It acts upon itself, being action. The inner self also changes, but it is also that which changes itself. We come now close to a definition finally for the entity, which cannot really be defined, because in your terms it escapes definition. However, the entity can be partially defined as the sum of all the selves within a given range of action, the simultaneous totality which on the one hand then cannot yet exist, since action can never complete itself, yet representing that impetus forever frustrated on the part of action for complete materialization.
quotes.translation: 它作用于自身，因为它是行动。内在自我也会改变，但它同时也是改变自身的东西。我们现在终于接近对存有的定义了，但它实际上无法被定义，因为用你们的术语来说，它超越了定义。然而，存有可以部分地被定义为在特定行动范围内所有自我的总和，是同时存在的整体，一方面尚不能存在，因为行动永远无法完成自身，却又代表着行动在完全物质化方面永远受挫的驱动力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now the moment points could also represent various personalities belonging to the entity, portions of its own consciousness that it sends upon the journeys of exploration and discovery. It is as if the nuclei of a cell could travel through itself. The boundaries of the entity would be imaginary, taking in as many moment points as the entity felt it could handle. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 现在，瞬间点也可以代表属于存有的各种人格，即它派出去进行探索和发现之旅的自身意识的部分。这就像细胞的核可以在自身内部穿行。存有的边界将是虚构的，包含存有认为它能处理的尽可能多的瞬间点。（停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The creativity of any given entity is endless, and yet all of the potentials for experience will be explored. The poor man may dream he is a king. A queen, weary of her role, may dream of being a peasant girl. In the physical time that you recognize, the king is still a king, and the queen a queen. Yet their dreams are not as uncharacteristic or apart from their experiences as it might appear. In greater terms, the king has been a pauper and the queen a peasant. You follow in terms of continuity one version of yourself at any given "time."
quotes.translation: 任何特定存有的创造力都是无穷无尽的，然而所有经验的潜能都会被探索。穷人可能梦见自己是国王，厌倦了角色的王后可能梦见自己是农家女。在你们所认知的物理时间里，国王仍是国王，王后仍是王后。但他们的梦境并非如表面看来那般不合常理或脱离经验。从更宏大的角度来看，国王曾为乞丐，王后曾为农妇。你们在连续性的概念中，只追随某个特定"时间"里的一个自我版本。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 721
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Concerning the overpopulation problem, remember that more than physical mechanisms are involved. The problem will be solved by mankind indeed; but mankind is composed of re-incarnational entities. It is quite within the probabilities that the statistics will reverse themselves and that for no reason that scientists can discover, children are born stillborn, as in a mass epidemic, and that entities simply refuse to inhabit the bodies made for them. The bodies then remaining empty to decay unused. (What a grim situation, I thought.)
quotes.translation: 关于人口过剩问题，请记住这涉及的不只是物理机制。这个问题确实将由人类解决；但人类是由转世存有所组成的。完全有可能出现统计数字反转的情况——出于科学家无法发现的原因，婴儿如大规模流行病般成批死产，存有们只是拒绝进驻为它们制造的身体。那些身体于是空置着腐烂，从未被使用。（多么可怕的局面，我想。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: If you will think （I hope） for simplicity's sake of the whole self as it exists on your plane with its physical body, conscious ego and inner self as one field unit, which is also part of the larger or more complete entity as one field unit within another, then perhaps it will not be too much for you to imagine the connection, or one of the connections, between the entity field and the whole-self field, which is on your plane as being the inner senses--that is, the inner senses are one of the connectives between these two fields.
quotes.translation: 如果你们愿意（我希望）为了简化起见，将存在于你们层面上的整体自我——连同其肉体、意识自我和内我——视为一个场域单元，而这个单元又是更大或更完整的存有（如同另一个场域单元中的子单元）的一部分，那么或许你们就不难想象存有场域与整体自我场域之间的连接（或其中之一）——在你们的层面上，这种连接就是内在感官。也就是说，内在感官是这两个场域之间的连接器之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The entity in this case would be compared to the mind. The brain would be more or less what it is, that is, the brain of the present personality existing on a camouflaged plane. As the brain gives orders and communicates messages to the various parts of the physical body, so would the mind or entity do in like manner. The mind would contain all data having to do with past existences and intertwining purposes, problems and relationships, but it would only give such data to the brain as was necessary for its present existence.
quotes.translation: 此处的存有可比作心智。大脑则或多或少保持其本质，即存在于伪装层面上的当前人格的大脑。正如大脑向身体各部位下达指令并传递信息，心智或存有也以类似方式运作。心智将包含与过去存在、交织的目的、问题及关系相关的所有数据，但它只会将当前存在所必需的数据传递给大脑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: At such times I'm apt to think about ideas of reincarnation and counterparts. Right here I'm dealing with just two of Seth's larger concepts. But without dwelling upon them too heavily, I may consider the notion of my larger, nonphysical "whole self" or "entity" being made up of a number of other psychically related physical selves projected into time. For Seth, basically there is no time, only a great "spacious present" that's a manifestation of a sublime, indescribable All That Is. Our gross physical senses, and indeed our very bodies, insist upon interpreting the spacious present in linear terms, however--through the inevitable processes of birth, aging, and death--so to help us get his point here Seth advances his ideas of reincarnational selves and counterpart selves in ways we can understand sensually.
quotes.translation: 在这种时候，我往往会思考转世与对应体的概念。这里我只涉及赛斯两个较大的概念。但不必过分深究，我可以考虑这样的概念：我那个更大的、非物质的"整体自我"或"存有"，是由许多投射到时间中的、灵性相关的其他物质自我所组成的。对赛斯而言，根本上没有时间，只有一个伟大的"广阔当下"——那是崇高而难以言喻的"一切万有"的显现。然而，我们粗钝的肉体感官，乃至我们的身体本身，都坚持用线性方式来诠释这个广阔当下——通过出生、衰老和死亡这些不可避免的过程——所以为了帮助我们理解他的观点，赛斯在此提出了转世自我和对应体自我的概念，以我们感官能理解的方式来阐述。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Even in God of Jane, which was published in 1981, Jane presented some relatively late material from Seth to show that he doesn't independently communicate with others. The idea that he'd done so can be inspiring, however. In Chapter 20 of her book, see Session 876 for August 27, 1979. After explaining how a couple of women (among others) had recently claimed that he had been in contact with them, Seth stated: "Now, I did not communicate with those women--but their belief in me helped each of them use certain abilities."
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: The trouble is that you frequently consider the soul or entity as a finished, static "thing" that belongs to you but is not you. The soul or entity -- in other words, your most intimate powerful inner identity -- is and must be forever changing. It is not, therefore, something like a cherished heirloom. It is alive, responsive, curious. It forms the flesh and the world that you know, and it is in a state of becoming.
quotes.translation: 问题在于，你们常常将灵魂或存有视为一个已完成、静止的"东西"，它属于你但又不是你。灵魂或存有——换言之，你们最亲密、最强大的内在身份——是且必须是永远在变化的。因此，它不像一件珍贵的传家宝。它是活生生的、有回应的、充满好奇的。它形成了你们所知的肉体与物质世界，并且始终处于"正在成为"的状态中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner senses, though I have in the past described them by separating their functions and characteristics, basically operate together in such a way that in your terms it would be highly difficult to separate one from the others. They function with a perfect spontaneous order, aware of all synchronicities. In that psychological universe, then, it is possible for entities "to be everywhere at once," aware of everything at once. Your world is composed of such "entities"--the units of consciousness that form your body. The kinds of conscious minds that you have cannot hold that kind of information.
quotes.translation: 内在感官虽然我过去曾通过区分其功能与特性来描述，但它们基本上协同运作，以至于以你们的说法极难将其中一种与其他区分开来。它们以完美的自发秩序运作，觉察所有同步性。在那个心理宇宙中，因此"存有"有可能"同时无处不在"，同时觉察一切。你们的世界由这样的"存有"构成——那些形成你们身体的意识单位。你们所拥有的那种意识心无法容纳这类信息。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There is indeed no contradiction, though it may appear so, in the fact that all entities existed before your planet was formed, and the fact that fragments form new entities. I have told you that your conception of cause and effect is faulty and antiquated, and I have said that the cause and effect theory is logical only as a result of your theory of time and continuity. If time as you think of it does not exist, and it does not, then the cause and effect theory does not follow.
quotes.translation: 确实没有矛盾，尽管可能看似如此，即所有存有在你们星球形成之前就已存在，以及碎片形成新存有的事实。我告诉过你们，你们对因果的概念是有缺陷且过时的，我也说过因果理论只有在你们的时间与连续性理论下才符合逻辑。如果你们所认为的时间并不存在——而它确实不存在——那么因果理论就不成立。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: That is the analogy. In actuality the mind is but a which looks out for the personality on the camouflage plane. Your guardian angel legends and such refer to this part of the entity, which is the mind and which is attached to the present personality during this particular existence. The mind helps to keep the personality from going too far astray. I use the term personality to include the whole person. I use it to express the entirety manifested in physical form, in one life.
quotes.translation: 这就是类比。实际上，心只是那个在伪装层上照看人格的部分。你们关于守护天使的传说之类指的就是存有的这一部分，即心，它在这次特定存在中与当前人格相连。心帮助防止人格偏离太远。我用"人格"一词来指代整个个体。我用它来表达在物质形态中、在一生中显现的整体性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: To a different degree it is filled with conscious semi personalities. I call them semi personalities merely to point out that they are not as developed as you are, as you are not as developed as your entity is. Nevertheless, that dream world experiences continuity. It is not aware of any break while, for example, you are sleeping. It does not know you sleep or wake. It merely exists to a fairly vivid degree while you sleep, and it sleeps but does not die while you are awake.
quotes.translation: 在不同程度上，它充满了有意识的半人格。我称它们为半人格只是为了指出它们不如你们发展完善，正如你们不如你们的存有发展完善。然而，那个梦境世界体验着连续性。例如，当你们睡觉时，它并不觉察任何中断。它不知道你们睡着或醒来。当你们睡觉时，它只是以相当生动的程度存在；而当你们清醒时，它沉睡但不会死亡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Many limitations are set upon personalities by their own entities for karmic reasons. I want to make it plain that free will does exist, but that it is limited through use of a more extended free will on the part of the entity. Also, the inner ego is aware of so-called future decisions not because he forces such decisions upon the outer ego but simply because the future as such does not exist to the inner ego, and therefore he can perceive where the outer ego cannot.
quotes.translation: 许多限制是由人格自身的存有出于业力原因而设定的。我想明确说明自由意志确实存在，但通过存有一方更扩展的自由意志的运用而受到限制。此外，内在自我觉察到所谓的未来决定，并非因为它将此类决定强加于外在自我，而仅仅是因为未来本身对内在自我并不存在，因此它能看见外在自我所不能见之处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There will be a joyous gathering together of his identity when the body dies. These are like the weaving together of mosaics, the weavings of the personality in and out, and no effect is meaningless nor without benefit. In this life you were meant to create, and teach. All creation is teaching. Your entity is older than your father's. You and Ruburt and I have been connected many times. The gestalt, the conditions, have in the past been beneficial for us all.
quotes.translation: 当身体死亡时，他的身份将有一次欢快的聚集。这就像马赛克的编织，人格进进出出的编织，没有哪个效果是无意义的或没有益处的。在此生中，你们本应创造和教导。所有创造都是教导。你们的存有比你们父亲的存有更古老。你和鲁柏以及我多次相连过。这个完形、这些条件在过去对我们所有人都曾是有益的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: Now you have indeed been doing well. And I do congratulate you. You are too impatient both with your own development and the development of others. You want your destination now and you want to get to that destination as quickly as possible, 8595 miles a minute, you see. You have given yourself several traffic tickets. Now, you have learned a good deal, and I know that you have tried. It does no good to understand issues intellectually, however, or even to understand them intuitively unless you understand them so thoroughly that they become a part of your daily life. Much that you know you have made a part of your life, but you still wish to use your knowledge for your own conscious purposes. You are still not willing to say let me develop as I should develop. You are still saying let me develop as I think I should develop. The I being a highly egotistical I. You are still saying, let me develop as I want to develop. You are still saying I want this person or I want that person or that thing. Therefore shall I use this ability and this knowledge to gai，，n it. And that is why you have given yourself a traffic ticket now and then。What you are learning is a technique for self development. You cannot use it, therefore, to attain those things that do not pertain to your own self development and the techniques will not help you get something that you were not meant to have nor that you have before decided as an entity that you should not have. I will leave specifics for later. Nevertheless, the facts remain that your own inner self and your own entity have given you challenges that you have accepted. Now you know these challenges; subconsciously you are aware of them. Consciously you do not want to accept them and this is one reason why you have had difficulty with the pendulum. This is not out of the ordinary. This happens to many personalities. It is nothing to blame yourself for. You are certainly in the midst of a certain line of development. You cannot blame yourself for not being further along the line. The very fact that you are here this evening, the very fact that you are trying as hard as you have been shows that you are indeed developing and that you are indeed learning. There must be an open-minded, an openhearted attitude here. You must not try to use what you have learned in a narrow, limiting way. This hampers your own development. It closes your eyes to many possibilities that will be important to you. It is natural, perhaps, to want to use what you have learned, this information, as a technique to achieve what you at any particular time think desirable, a particular person, a particular thing. But what is important is the inner development. If this is taken care of, it will automatically lead you to the person that is best for you and to the circumstances that will help you develop. To insist that a specific individual or a specific goal be attained through these methods is limiting. There must always be the acknowledgement that you do not consciously as yet realize the depths of yourself, the goals you have set and the challenges, and this material should be used to open up your inner horizons and to lead you in those directions toward which your inner self has already set you. If you then egotistically, say--No--this particular situation is what I want, then you may be blocking the inner direction which has been meant for you. I said I would discuss some particular material and so I shall shortly. But the inner attitude is far more important. I suggest, Joseph, that you take a break and I shall continue.
quotes.translation: 你们确实做得很好，我由衷祝贺你们。但你们对自己和他人的发展都过于急躁。你们想要立刻抵达终点，并以最快速度到达，每分钟8595英里，明白吗？你们已经给自己开了好几张超速罚单。你们确实学到了很多，我知道你们努力过。然而，仅凭理智理解问题并无益处，甚至凭直觉理解也不够，除非你们理解得如此透彻，以至于它们成为日常生活的一部分。你们所知的许多内容已融入生活，但仍希望为自己的有意识目的而运用知识。你们仍不愿说“让我按照应有的方式发展”，而是说“让我按照我认为应该的方式发展”——这个“我”是高度自我中心的。你们仍在说“让我按照我想要的方式发展”，仍在说“我想要这个人”或“我想要那个人或那个东西”，因此我要用这种能力和知识去获得它。这就是你们时不时给自己开罚单的原因。你们所学的是自我发展的技巧，因此不能用它来获取与自身发展无关的事物，这些技巧也不会帮你们得到本不该拥有、或作为存有早已决定不应拥有的东西。具体细节我稍后再谈。但事实是，你们的内在自我和存有已赋予你们接受的挑战。你们知道这些挑战，潜意识中清楚它们，但有意识层面却不愿接受——这正是你们在摆锤上遇到困难的原因之一。这并非异常，许多人格都会经历。无需自责。你们确实处于某条发展路线中，不能因尚未走得更远而责备自己。今晚你们在此的事实，以及你们如此努力尝试的事实，都证明你们确实在发展、在学习。必须保持开放的心态和开放的胸怀。不要试图以狭隘、局限的方式运用所学，这会阻碍自身发展，使你们对许多重要可能性视而不见。想要将所学信息作为技巧，去获取特定时期认为可取的事物——某个人、某件东西——或许很自然。但重要的是内在发展。若处理好这一点，它会自动引导你们走向最适合的人和环境。坚持通过这种方法获得特定个体或目标，是局限的。必须始终承认，你们有意识层面尚未认识到自身的深度、所设定的目标和挑战。这些资料应被用来开启内在视野，引导你们走向内在自我已设定的方向。若你们以自我为中心说“不，我就要这个特定情境”，就可能阻碍内在指引的方向。我说过会讨论一些具体资料，很快就会。但内在态度远比这些重要。约瑟，我建议你休息一下，我稍后继续。
