quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (I thought it a good idea that this be the end of the session, however, Seth came through again at 10:30 as the three of us sat talking about various things. A humorous repartee followed, with Seth answering our questions on a variety of subjects. Two serious notes: Alice Butts, who died last week, has already visited my father. And Dr. Instream, who would say "There is no Seth, " has not much longer to live. Also -- Bill Gallagher will not see certain truths about himself etc. Alice Butts not helping Ruth Butts ' son, etc. See Session 398.)

quotes.text: Your consciousness is not a thing that you possess. Your individuality is not a thing with limits. If you ask, "What is my individuality in all of this?" or, "Which 'I' am I?" then you are automatically thinking of yourself as a psychological entity with definite boundaries that must be protected at all costs. You may say, "I was born in a house on a certain street in a certain town, and no present belief to the contrary will change that fact." If, in the present, one past event can be altered within your neuronal structure, however, then basically no event is safe from such change.
quotes.translation: 你的意识并非你所拥有的东西。你的个体性并非有界限的事物。若你问“这一切中我的个体性是什么？”或“哪个‘我’才是我？”，你便自动将自己视为一个必须不惜一切代价保护其明确边界的心理存有。你可能会说：“我出生在某镇某街的某栋房子里，任何相反信念都无法改变这个事实。”然而，若当下能改变你神经元结构中的某个过去事件，那么从根本上说，没有事件能免于这种改变。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: To this degree Dunne was correct. But the important point, if you will forgive a pun, is that these moment points are all intensities, electrical realities, and traveling through such dimensions involves a transformation of energy from one intensity to another. The whole self, or the entity of which I speak, is composed of all of these selves, but it must be realized that all divisions between these selves are illusions, basically speaking. For the sake of discussion we separate them, but in doing so we almost manage to change the very nature of that which we attempt to study.
quotes.translation: 邓恩在某种程度上是正确的。但关键点在于——请原谅我使用双关——这些时刻点都是强度、电性实相，穿越这类维度涉及能量从一种强度到另一种强度的转化。整体自我，或我所说的存有，由所有这些自我组成，但必须认识到，这些自我之间的所有划分，从根本上说都是幻相。为讨论方便我们将其分开，但这样做几乎改变了我们试图研究之物的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: He has passed over the hump of early adulthood, that you passed through some time before, and you are both ready to give yourselves to your work. There will be an added placidity, as well as spontaneity. We will return to our material. Much work that we have done however in terms of the Philip (John Bradley 's entity area is Philip) readings, will be of great value, and serve to add to the authenticity, in other people's eyes, of your adventure.
quotes.translation: 他已度过你们早些时候经历的青年期巅峰，你们都已准备好投身于工作。将会有更多的平静与自发性。我们会回到资料上。然而，我们以菲利普（约翰·布拉德利的存有领域是菲利普）解读形式所做的大量工作将极具价值，并有助于在他人眼中增加你们冒险的真实性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The entity, after all, does just this in creating the various personalities. What are they but projections or fragments from the entity itself? What the entity does however it does consciously and with purpose, since it is by definition beneath consciousness, and without consciousness there is no purpose.
quotes.translation: 毕竟，存有在创造各种人格时正是如此。它们不过是存有自身的投射或片段吗？然而，存有所为之事是有意识且有目的的，因为按定义它处于意识之下，而没有意识就没有目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. I have said that any of you and all of you create a dream universe of validity, actuality, durability, and for Philip's benefit, self-determination, in the same manner that the entity projects the reality of its various personalities. As there is no contact between the entity and the ordinary conscious ego, so there is no contact on a conscious level between the self who dreams and the dream world which has its own independent existence.
quotes.translation: 现在。我曾说过，你们中的任何人和所有人，都创造了一个具有有效性、实相性、持久性，以及——为了菲利普——自决性的梦境宇宙，其方式与存有投射其各种人格的实相相同。正如存有与普通有意识自我之间没有接触，做梦的自我与拥有独立存在的梦境世界之间，在有意识层面也没有接触。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Not only is the entity strengthened, but portions of it, having been actualized in three-dimensional existence, now add to the very quality and nature of that existence. Without this creativity, planetary life in your terms would always be sterile. The soul or entity then gives breath to the body, and to the three-dimensional self within it. The three-dimensional self then goes about its purpose of opening up new areas of creativity.
quotes.translation: 不仅存有得到强化，其部分在三维存在中实现后，更增添了该存在的品质与本质。若无此创造力，以你们的话来说，行星生命将永远贫瘠。灵魂或存有赋予身体呼吸，也赋予其内的三维自我生命。三维自我随后展开其使命，开拓新的创造力领域。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Ruburt's mother is part of an entity, and he should remember this. He does not have arthritis, although he has been mimicking the symptoms, and could in time hypnotize himself into believing he did have the disease, though this is highly improbable given his own constitution. The spontaneous self happens to be basically more powerful and far more sensible than the ego, and would never stand for this development. It would doubtless cause some sort of an explosion however, in order to prevent any such occurrence.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏的母亲是某个存有的一部分，他应谨记这点。他并未罹患关节炎，尽管他一直在模仿症状，并可能逐渐催眠自己相信确实患病——但鉴于其体质，这种可能性极低。自发自我本质上比自我更强大、更明智，绝不会容忍这种发展。不过它无疑会引发某种爆发，以防此类事件发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: And in each of these planes of existence there is a reflection of the basic laws of the spacious present itself, which I am in the process of giving you. Therefore there is no need, really, to think of a given group of entities before the birth of your planet. I have said that all the entities who would ever dwell upon your plane did exist, and actually have a hand in on the creation of your planet, that would ever dwell upon it.
quotes.translation: 在每一个存在层面，都映照着广阔当下本身的基本法则——这些法则我正逐步传授给你们。因此，实在无需想象在你们星球诞生前存在某个特定群体。我曾说过，所有曾栖居、将栖居于你们层面的存有，都确实存在，并实际参与了你们星球的创造。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I have mentioned this many times. There are no boundaries to the self, and no barriers put upon its development. A personality may "originally" be a part of a given entity, and on its own develop interests quite different. It can on its own take a lonely way, or it can instead attach itself or gravitate toward other entities with interests like its own. The original connection will not be severed, but new ones made and formed.
quotes.translation: 我已多次提及：自我没有边界，其发展不受任何限制。某个人格可能"最初"是特定存有的一部分，而后独立发展出截然不同的兴趣。它可以独自踏上孤寂之路，也可依附或趋向其他志趣相投的存有。原始联结不会断裂，但新的联结会不断形成。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now such invasion is usually the sudden appearance of previously unacceptable beliefs, quite conscious but invisible, tucked away. Then they suddenly appear as alien. In most instances the possession concept makes it all the more upsetting. Easier to face, often, is the idea that the responsibility for such ideas must belong to another entity or being. In all cases of this nature involving Augustus-type episodes, the problem is one of unassimilated beliefs. Instead of such comparatively drastic behavior, however, such beliefs can be expressed through various parts of the body. Unfortunately, a system of medicine that largely deals with symptoms only encourages a patient to project such beliefs on new organs, for instance, after already sacrificing others in operations.
quotes.translation: 此类入侵通常是先前不被接受的信念突然显现——这些信念完全有意识却无形，被深藏起来，然后突然以异己姿态出现。在多数案例中，附身概念加剧了困扰。更易面对的说法是：此类想法的责任必属其他存有或存在。所有涉及奥古斯都式插曲的案例中，问题核心都是未被整合的信念。不过，此类信念未必通过如此激烈行为表现，也可能经由身体各部位表达。不幸的是，主要处理症状的医疗体系，往往在患者手术牺牲某些器官后，又鼓励其将此类信念投射到新器官上。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The chicken cannot read a book. It cannot choose to read. The plant cannot choose to walk down the street. The chicken and the plant can choose to live or die, however -- rather important issues in the existence of any entity. They can choose to like or dislike their environment, and to change it according to their individual circumstances. It is fashionable to say that some scientific laws can be proven at microscopic levels, where, for example, small particles can be accelerated far beyond [their usual states]. But you quite studiously ignore that feeling exists on microscopic levels, that there can be psychological particles, much less come to the conclusion that all particles are psychological particles, with their own impetuses for development and value fulfillment. That is why atoms join together to form matter. They seek the fulfillment of themselves through form. They cooperatively choose the forms that they take.
quotes.translation: 鸡无法阅读书籍，无法选择阅读。植物无法选择沿街行走。但鸡与植物能选择生存或死亡——这对任何存有的存在都是至关重要之事。它们能选择喜欢或厌恶环境，并根据自身境况改变环境。时下流行声称某些科学定律可在微观层面验证，例如微小粒子能被加速至远超常态。但你们刻意忽视微观层面存在感受，忽视存在心理粒子，更遑论得出所有粒子都是心理粒子的结论——它们各自具有发展的动力与价值完成的追求。正因如此，原子才结合形成物质。它们通过形态寻求自我完成，并合作选择所采取的形态。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (According to him, tonight's session after 9:52 isn't book material either, but Jane and I are presenting it here because in it Seth returns to questions I'd asked earlier in Mass Events: What about the roles played in human affairs by viruses like smallpox? As I quoted myself in the opening notes for the 840th session: "What is the real relationship between the host organism and disease?" See Session 840 itself, and certain parts of Session 841.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: This is actually not as bad an analogy as I first thought, in that oftentimes a particular personality will be like the right arm of the entity as a whole, while another particular personality will have both feet on the ground. To get back however to the original point I wish to make, there is a point beyond which the most suggestible personality will be beyond reach, no matter what the circumstances are. Manifestations of the personality may follow the lines that suggestion commands. This is bad enough, but it only means that the personality has been forced to change its mode of action in the physical world. The personality seems shattered because the actions seem so changed. And here again we have your cause and effect, misapplied. The basic personality, that is the primary personality, has not been changed and will not change except through the personality itself.
quotes.translation: 这实际上并不像我最初以为的那样是个糟糕的比喻，因为通常某个特定人格会像整个存有的右臂，而另一个特定人格则会脚踏实地。不过回到我原本想说的重点：无论情况如何，总有一个临界点，超过这个点后，即使是最易受暗示的人格也无法被触及。人格的表现形式可能遵循暗示的指令，这已经够糟了，但这只意味着人格被迫改变了其在物质世界中的行动模式。人格看似支离破碎，只是因为行动看起来变化太大。这里我们又看到了你们误用的因果律。基本人格，即主要人格，并未改变，除非通过人格自身，否则也不会改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The inner ego knows when to apply safety valves, and is aware of the danger before the outer ego is alerted. The inner ego is concerned with maintaining the foundations and balance, which is very important, of the whole self, and it is open to messages from the overall entity. The inner ego receives messages through the inner senses, and is aware of realities which the outer ego cannot afford to recognize because of its specialization. In some important aspects the outer ego is supposed to represent to some degree the subdominant personalities who still dwell in the subconscious. When the outer ego is narrow, and poorly represents these subdominant personalities then they rise up in arms, and when conditions are favorable attempt to express themselves through a momentary weakness on the part of the dominant ego. But without even doing this they may momentarily take over or express themselves through a single function, such as speech or motion, while the outer ego is blissfully unaware.
quotes.translation: 内在自我知道何时启用安全阀，并在外在自我警觉之前就已意识到危险。内在自我关注的是维持整个自性的根基与平衡——这非常重要——并且它随时接收来自整体存有的讯息。内在自我通过内在感官接收讯息，并意识到那些因专业化而无法被外在自我承认的实相。在某些重要方面，外在自我本应在一定程度上代表仍潜藏于潜意识中的次支配人格。当外在自我狭隘且未能妥善代表这些次支配人格时，它们便会奋起反抗，并在条件有利时试图通过支配自我的短暂弱点来表达自己。但即使不这样做，它们也可能暂时接管或通过单一功能（如言语或动作）表达自己，而外在自我却浑然不觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The entity should therefore not be thought of as completed. The electric universe, of which you know so little, is a reality, and yet it is also a symbol of another reality. For behind even this electrical universe there is a reality which cannot be explored in terms of speech; for all consciousness, while having an electric reality, has a reality beyond even this. It is the vitality of the universe, and all universes, which causes the electrical reality, and the vitality of the universe, composing everything that is, cannot be touched. It is touch, but touch not as it is conceived of in your terms. This vitality is the most immediate and intimate aspect that composes the camouflage appearance within all fields. And yet it is by far more than the camouflage.
quotes.translation: 因此，不应将存有视为已完成之物。你们知之甚少的电性宇宙是一个实相，但它同时也是另一个实相的象征。因为即使在这个电性宇宙背后，也存在一个无法用言语探索的实相；一切意识虽具有电性实相，但其实相甚至超越于此。正是宇宙及所有宇宙的生命力引发了电性实相，而构成万物的宇宙生命力本身是无法被触及的。它是触觉本身，但并非你们概念中的触觉。这种生命力是所有场域中构成伪装表象最直接、最内在的面向，然而它远不止是伪装。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Again, you are doing very well. Bega is learning my material in our own classes, but he must also interpret this, and as I said earlier he tailors it for you, knowing you so well. Now, I adopt the personality that you know, and it is quite legitimate, but it is only one of my personalities. Know then that other personalities are also here, and in ways that you do not understand, and that is the end of the sentence. (To me, humorously.) The familiar human component is necessary, and it is by my characteristics that you know me, but the entity is an ancient one, and we are far more concerned with other things than your position at your bank.
quotes.translation: 再说一次，你们做得很好。贝加在我们自己的课堂上学习我的资料，但他也必须诠释这些内容，正如我之前所说，他深知你，因此为你量身定制。现在，我采用你们所知的这个人格，这完全合理，但这只是我众多人格之一。要知道，其他人格也在此处，以你们无法理解的方式存在——这句话到此为止。（对我幽默地说）熟悉的人类成分是必要的，你们正是通过我的特征认识我，但这个存有是古老的，我们关心的事情远比你银行里的职位重要得多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The entity and its time are not separate. They are one. Basically time is simply psychological experience, regardless of the lapses between perception or the manner of perception. The entity is its own experience.
quotes.translation: 存有与其时间并非分离。它们是一体的。基本上，时间只是心理体验，无论感知之间的间隔或感知方式如何。存有即是其自身的体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It does therefore contain within it the knowledge of its experiences upon your plane, though such an entity can spring from any plane. This of course represents the most extraordinary possibility, and such an entity can, if it is so propelled by its own strength, exist upon a variety of planes, carrying along with it knowledge of all previous planes; and each of its outer egos have the same opportunities. This is important.
quotes.translation: 因此，它确实包含其在你们层面上的经验知识，尽管这样的存有可能源自任何层面。这当然代表了最非凡的可能性，而这样的存有——如果被自身力量所驱动——可以存在于多种层面上，并携带所有先前层面的知识；它的每个外在自我都拥有同样的机会。这一点很重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Each portion of the entity is unique and independent, and through its own beliefs determines what it will accept in terms of influences within its immediate life situation. The great miracle, in fact, is that each consciousness, whatever its degree, is itself and no other, even while in the unending fields of interaction it may be a portion of another -- as a city is part of a state, or an individual is part of a family.
quotes.translation: 存有的每个部分都是独特而独立的，并通过自身的信念决定在当下生活情境中接受哪些影响。事实上，最伟大的奇迹在于：每个意识无论其层次如何，都是它自己而非其他——即便在无尽的互动领域中，它可能成为另一存有的一部分——如同城市是州的一部分，或个体是家庭的一部分。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I am not saying that words cannot be used to describe the psyche, but they cannot define it. It is futile to question: "What is the difference between my psyche and my soul, my entity and my greater being?" for all of these are terms used in an effort to express the greater portions of your own experience that you sense within yourself. Your use of language may make you impatient for definitions, however. Hopefully this book will allow you some intimate awareness, some definite experience, that will acquaint you with the nature of your own psyche, and then you will see that its reality escapes all definitions, defies all categorizing, and shoves aside with exuberant creativity all attempts to wrap it up in a neat package.
quotes.translation: 我并非说语言无法描述心灵，但语言无法定义它。追问"我的心灵与灵魂、存有与更高存在之间有何区别"是徒劳的——所有这些术语都试图表达你内在感知到的、自身经验的更广阔部分。然而，语言的使用可能让你急于寻求定义。希望本书能让你获得某种亲密的觉知、某种确切的体验，使你认识自身心灵的本质，届时你将明白：它的实相超越一切定义，抗拒所有分类，并以蓬勃的创造力将所有试图将其包装成整齐包裹的尝试推至一旁。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: But would our time traveler ever want to give up his or her present mental and physical focus to enter completely into an earlier personality? I think not, in the overwhelming majority of cases--and perhaps never--for in those terms it would mean surrendering a portion of the whole self or entity that had, through a projection into our scheme of "present" time, attained a certain consciousness and physical form of a unique degree. Yet, on second thought I wouldn't dare rule out completely such bizarre developments. Perhaps transfers like that can and do take place within the vast arena of probable realities (which I'll also be discussing in this essay). If so, then, they would be strange only from our limited viewpoints.
quotes.translation: 但我们的时间旅行者会愿意放弃当前的身心焦点，完全进入早期人格吗？我认为在绝大多数情况下不会——或许永远不会——因为从那些角度而言，这意味着放弃通过投射进入我们"当下"时间架构而获得独特意识与物质形态的整个自体或存有的一部分。然而转念一想，我不敢完全排除这种奇异发展的可能性。或许此类转移确实能在可能实相的广阔领域（我将在本文中进一步讨论）中发生。若果真如此，它们仅在我们有限的视角下显得怪异。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Even in God of Jane, which was published in 1981, Jane presented some relatively late material from Seth to show that he doesn't independently communicate with others. The idea that he'd done so can be inspiring, however. In Chapter 20 of her book, see Session 876 for August 27, 1979. After explaining how a couple of women (among others) had recently claimed that he had been in contact with them, Seth stated: "Now, I did not communicate with those women--but their belief in me helped each of them use certain abilities."
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: An entity is composed of what you may call feminine and masculine characteristics, but when all energy is focused into masculine-oriented personalities then a backlog develops, so that the entity is left with only unused, un-manifested, so-far-denied feminine characteristics.
quotes.translation: 存有由你们所谓的阴性与阳性特质构成，但当所有能量聚焦于阳性导向的人格时，便会产生积压，使存有仅剩未被使用、未显化、迄今被否定的阴性特质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I also said that new entities were being formed, but in the framework of the spacious present all this is spontaneous. The contradiction seems a contradiction only on your terms. On my terms there is none. For practical purposes you may say, in truth on your own terms, that entities simply have had time to develop further personalities. But I want it understood that this is true only within your own time framework.
quotes.translation: 我也说过新存有正在形成，但在广袤当下的架构中，这一切都是自发的。矛盾仅在你们的认知框架中看似矛盾，在我而言并无矛盾。为实用目的，你们可以依据自身认知如实说：存有只是有更多时间发展出更多人格。但我希望你们明白，这仅在你们的时间框架内成立。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In many philosophies this sort of idea is retained -- the soul being returned to a primal giver, or being dissolved in a nebulous state somewhere between being and nonbeing. The soul is, however, first of all creative. It can be discussed from many viewpoints. Its characteristics can be given to some degree, and indeed most of my readers could find out these characteristics for themselves if they were highly enough motivated, and if this was their main concern. The soul or entity is itself the most highly motivated, most highly energized, and most potent consciousness-unit known in any universe.
quotes.translation: 许多哲学体系保留着这种观念——灵魂回归原始给予者，或在存在与非存在之间的模糊状态中消融。然而，灵魂首先是创造性的。它可以从多个角度被探讨，其特质可在一定程度上被揭示——事实上，若动机足够强烈且以此为要务，大多数读者都能自行发现这些特质。灵魂或存有本身，是任何宇宙中已知最具动机、最高能量、最强大的意识单位。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: A psychic gestalt is dependent upon matter, not for its identity but merely for its survival in the physical plane. Psychic gestalts or identities or individualities are for all practical purposes immortal. They may join other gestalts but they will never be less than they once were. Identity then is never broken down. Any apparent breaking down is never an actual fact, as the personality could be thought of as a breaking down of the entity; but this is not so. The personality did not exist as such before its creation by the entity, and once it becomes an identity, it retains that individuality.
quotes.translation: 心灵完形依赖物质，并非为了其身份，而仅仅是为了在物质层面的存续。心灵完形或身份或个体性，实际上是不朽的。它们可能与其他完形结合，但绝不会比它们曾经的样子更少。因此，身份永远不会被分解。任何看似分解的情况都不是实际事实，正如人格可以被视为存有的分解，但事实并非如此。人格在被存有创造之前并不存在，而一旦它成为一个身份，它就保留了那个个体性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This sort of experience involves a sudden psychic awareness, straight from the entity, that all boundaries are for practical purposes only. However, there are indeed many kinds of science. There are a number of sciences dealing just with locomotion. Had the human species gone into certain mental disciplines as thoroughly as it has explored technological disciplines, its practical transportation system would be vastly different, and yet by this time even more practical than it is now. (With amusement:) I am making this point because I want it made plain -- this, dear Joseph, is a pun -- that when I speak of science on another plane I may not speak of the plain old science that you know.
quotes.translation: 这种体验涉及一种直接来自存有的突然心灵觉知，即所有界限实际上只是为实用目的而设。然而，确实存在许多种科学。有许多科学仅仅涉及运动。如果人类物种像探索技术学科那样彻底地进入某些心智学科，其实用的交通系统将会截然不同，而且到此时甚至比现在更实用。（带着幽默：）我提出这一点，是因为我想让它明确——亲爱的约瑟夫，这是一个双关语——当我在另一个层面谈论科学时，我可能不是在谈论你所知道的普通旧科学。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 713)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: As the physical atoms and molecules combine to form cells, and the cells to form physical organs, and as they do not lose their individuality in so doing, and as the atoms and molecules themselves actually gain and share in higher perceptions because of this gestalt, so do the basic components or fragments of an entity constantly form new and varied personalities; and these in turn form entities of their own.
quotes.translation: 正如物理原子和分子结合形成细胞，细胞形成物理器官，而它们在此过程中并未失去个体性，并且原子和分子本身实际上因这种完形而获得并共享更高的感知，同样，存有的基本组成部分或片段不断形成新的、多样的人格；而这些人格又形成它们自己的存有。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Souls are also creative psychic structures, ever-changing and yet always retaining individual integrity (pause), and all are dependent one upon the other. Souls make up the life of the entity in those terms. Yet the entity is "more" than the soul is. Take a break.
quotes.translation: 灵魂也是创造性的心灵结构，不断变化，却始终保留个体完整性（停顿），并且所有灵魂都相互依赖。灵魂在这些术语中构成了存有的生命。然而，存有比灵魂“更多”。休息一下。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This sort of experience involves a sudden psychic awareness, straight from the entity, that all boundaries are for practical purposes only. However there are indeed many kinds of science. There are many sciences just dealing with locomotion. Had the human race for example gone into certain mental disciplines as thoroughly as it has explored technological disciplines, its practical transportation system would be vastly different, and yet by this time even more practical than it is now. I am making this point because I want it made plain--this, dear Joseph, is a pun--that when I speak of science on another plane I may not speak of the plain old science that you know.
quotes.translation: 这种体验涉及一种直接来自存有的突然心灵觉知，即所有界限实际上只是为实用目的而设。然而，确实存在许多种科学。有许多科学仅仅涉及运动。例如，如果人类像探索技术学科那样彻底地进入某些心智学科，其实用的交通系统将会截然不同，而且到此时甚至比现在更实用。我提出这一点，是因为我想让它明确——亲爱的约瑟夫，这是一个双关语——当我在另一个层面谈论科学时，我可能不是在谈论你所知道的普通旧科学。

quotes.text: If you perceived the constant change within your body with as much persistence as you attend to its seemingly permanent nature, then you would be amazed that you ever considered the body as one more or less constant, more or less cohesive, entity. Even subjectively you focus upon and indeed manufacture the idea of a relatively stable, relatively permanent conscious self. You stress those ideas and thoughts and attitudes that you recall from "past" experience as your own, completely ignoring those that once were "characteristic" and now are vanished -- ignoring the fact also that you cannot hold thought. The thought of a moment before, in your terms, vanishes away.
quotes.translation: 如果你像关注身体看似永恒的性质那样持续地感知身体内的不断变化，那么你会惊讶于自己曾认为身体是一个或多或少恒定、或多或少凝聚的实体。即使在主观上，你也聚焦于并实际上制造了一个相对稳定、相对永久的意识自我的概念。你强调那些你从“过去”经验中回忆起的、作为你自己的思想、想法和态度，完全忽略了那些曾经是“特征性”而现在已消失的——也忽略了你无法抓住思想的事实。按你的说法，片刻前的思想已然消失。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I am explaining this matter rather thoroughly because we will be getting to matters concerning the entity and its personality developments. The entity, for example, works with the same sort of individual cooperation, and uses building blocks of energy in much the same manner, that the atoms and molecules in the physical world combine to form cells, organs, and the whole structure of the physical body.
quotes.translation: 我正在相当详尽地解释这件事，因为接下来我们会涉及"存有"及其人格发展的问题。举例来说，存有以同样的个体合作方式运作，使用能量积木的方式与物质世界中原子分子结合成细胞、器官及整个肉体结构的方式极为相似。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: If you use psychological time as I have told you, you will get immediate firsthand experience of many facets of reality which take me pages to explain with the indirect use of words. All entities basically are self-aware portions of energy or vitality. They are self-generating and there is no possibility of thinking in terms of either beginning or end. Again, it is only your own camouflage- imprisoned data which makes you think that everything has a beginning and an end.
quotes.translation: 如果你按照我告诉你的方式运用心理时间，你将直接获得许多实相层面的第一手经验，而这些经验我需要用数页篇幅通过间接的文字来阐述。所有存有本质上都是具有自我意识的能量或生命力片段。它们是自我生成的，无法用开始或结束的概念来思考。再次强调，正是你们被幻相禁锢的数据让你们认为万物皆有始有终。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Your father's entity's name is Arruhk, A-r-r-u-h-k. I cannot go into all the problems of his present personality. They are definite challenges that he had to face, and the overall entity is facing the majority of these in one fell swoop, for his own reasons.
quotes.translation: 你父亲的存有名字是阿鲁克（Arruhk），A-r-r-u-h-k。我无法详述他当前人格的所有问题。这些都是他必须面对的明确挑战，而整体存有正出于自身原因，以雷霆之势处理其中大部分挑战。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The greatest abilities of a personality may often be brought into physical expression, however, because of certain rhythms that are not understood. In a manner of speaking you can say that the energy of an entity is dispersed, striking the space-time continuum at certain angles and always bouncing back. But the energy is always in contact with itself even while it impinges into physical existence.
quotes.translation: 然而，人格最伟大的能力往往能通过某些未被理解的韵律得以在物质层面展现。可以说，存有的能量是分散的，以特定角度撞击时空连续体并不断反弹。但即便在冲击物质存在时，这种能量始终与自身保持联系。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The secondary personalities find fulfillment mainly in the dream world, but the dream world is as actual and as real, as effective and efficient as your own. Here various problems set for the entity are worked out, problems that either are too minor to be handled by a primary self on your plane, or problems that for one reason or another could simply not be solved by physical constructions.
quotes.translation: 次要人格主要在梦境世界获得满足，但梦境世界与你们的世界同样真实、同样有效。存有设定的各种问题在此得到解决——这些问题要么过于细微而无法由你们层面的主要自我处理，要么因某种原因根本无法通过物质建构来解决。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: (A one-minute pause.) Each natural element had its own key system that interlocked with others, forming channels through which consciousness could flow from one kind of life to another. Man understood himself to be a separate entity, but one that was connected to all of nature. The emotional reaches of his subjective life, then, leapt far beyond what you think of as private experience. Each person participating fully in a storm, for example, still participated in his or her own individual way. Yet the grandeur of the emotions was allowed full sway, and the seasons of the earth and the world were jointly felt.
quotes.translation: （停顿一分钟。）每个自然元素都有与其他元素环环相扣的关键系统，形成意识能在不同生命形态间流动的通道。人类理解自己是独立的存有，但也是与整个自然相连的存有。因此，其主观生命的情感疆域远远超越你们所认为的私人经验范畴。例如，每个人在充分参与一场风暴时，仍以各自独特的方式参与其中。然而，情感的壮阔得以全然展现，大地与世界的季节被共同感知。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: On your particular kind of culturally organized grouping the camouflage is necessarily strong, and the outside senses correspondingly vivid. This of course is bound to block some inner data. At the same time it is the inner vitality which creates the camouflage to begin with. Joseph was right when he spoke of entities creating stages upon which to act out their problems. The point of course being that once the play begins the actors are so completely immersed in their roles that they forget that they themselves wrote the play, constructed the sets, or are even acting. The reason for this is rather apparent.
quotes.translation: 在你们这种特定文化组织形态中，伪装必然十分强烈，外在感官也相应鲜明。这自然会阻碍某些内在资讯的接收。但与此同时，正是内在生命力创造了最初的伪装。约瑟夫说得对，他说"存有"创造了舞台来演绎自身的问题。关键在于，一旦戏剧开演，演员们完全沉浸于角色之中，以至于忘记了自己才是剧本的作者、布景的设计者，甚至忘记了他们正在表演。其原因相当明显。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The "you" who is capable of such expansion must be a far more creative and multidimensional personality than you earlier imagined. Many of the suggested small exercises given earlier in the book will also help you become acquainted with your own reality, will give you direct experience with the nature of your own soul or entity, and will put you in contact with those portions of your being from which your own vitality springs. You may or may not have your own encounters with past reincarnational selves or probable selves. You may or may not catch yourselves in the act of changing levels of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 那个能够进行如此扩展的"你"，必定是一个比你先前想象的更具创造力、更多维的人格。本书前面建议的许多小练习，也能帮助你认识自己的实相，让你直接体验自己灵魂或"存有"的本质，并让你接触到自己生命力所源起的那些部分。你可能会或不会遇到自己过去的转世自我或可能自我。你可能会或不会在改变意识层次的过程中捕捉到自己的身影。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are certain requirements as you remember that must be met, upon your plane and upon others. Yet an ego, an outer ego, cannot choose to be an entity in any case until its comprehension attains a certain degree. And now, my dear patient Joseph, may I tell you also that you are part of that same entity; and this is one of the main reasons why I am able to communicate with you both.
quotes.translation: 正如你所记得的，在你的层面和其他层面，都必须满足某些要求。然而，一个自我，一个外在自我，在其理解达到一定程度之前，无论如何都无法选择成为一个"存有"。现在，我亲爱的耐心约瑟夫，请允许我告诉你，你也是同一个"存有"的一部分；这也是我能够与你们两人沟通的主要原因之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It will manipulate those memories in its own way, and alter them, and add to the pool of energy from which it has emerged. It is quite familiar with me, now, through your experience. At this moment, in your terms, its view of reality is more pure than your own. It is aware of you both as psychic entities, and retains strong and unclouded perceptions of your past relationship. These connections must pass from its memory as it matures. The memories can be retained, but the primary focus of activity and the intensity must deal with this personality, and with this existence as you think of it.
quotes.translation: 它会以自己的方式处理那些记忆，改变它们，并为其所源起的能量池增添能量。现在，通过你的经验，它对我已相当熟悉。以你们的时间观念来看，它对实相的看法比你们自己的更为纯粹。它意识到你们两人都是心灵"存有"，并保留着对你们过去关系的强烈而清晰的感知。随着它的成熟，这些联系必须从它的记忆中淡去。记忆可以保留，但活动的主要焦点和强度必须处理这个人格，以及你们所认为的这个存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The entity itself does not have to keep constant check on its personalities, because in each personality there is an inner self-conscious part that knows its origin. This part, for now, I will call the self-conscious beyond the subconscious. The breather and the dreamer are not so automatically controlled as it would seem. I have mentioned before that some part of you knows exactly how much oxygen the lungs breathe, and how much energy it takes to pace a floor, and this is the part of you of which I spoke. It is the part, and the self-conscious part, that receives all inner data.
quotes.translation: "存有"本身不必持续监控其人格，因为在每个人格中都有一个内在的、有自我意识的部分，知道自己的起源。这个部分，我现在暂且称之为"潜意识之上的自我意识"。呼吸者和做梦者并非像看起来那样被自动控制。我之前提到过，你的一部分确切知道肺部呼吸了多少氧气，踱步需要多少能量，这就是我所说的那个部分。正是这个部分，这个有自我意识的部分，接收所有内在资讯。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This has happened, although in what you would call primitive societies. Such personalities were more sheltered than they would be in yours. This could result in a temporary, but thoroughly frightening existence between planes that would require utmost caution on the part of the entity. Each plane necessitates its own orientation, and such a personality would have none. If the situation should ever arise I would advise that neither of you experiment with such drugs. Ruburt in particular, but this also applies to you, Joseph, and there is absolutely no distortion in this statement.
quotes.translation: 这种情况曾经发生过，尽管是在你们所谓的原始社会中。那些人格比在你们的社会中受到更多的庇护。这可能导致一种暂时的、但完全令人恐惧的层面间存在状态，需要"存有"方面极其谨慎。每个层面都需要其自身的定向，而这样的人格将毫无定向。如果出现这种情况，我建议你们两人都不要尝试此类药物。鲁柏尤其要注意，但这也适用于你，约瑟夫，这个陈述绝对没有任何扭曲。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There were many reasons why John and his wife met and began their relationship. While such situations as Peggy's illness are chosen by the entity, the individual is always left to work out its own solution. Complete recovery, illness or early death, for example, are not preordained on the part of the entity. The general situation is set up in response to deep inner involvements.
quotes.translation: 约翰与妻子相遇并开始关系有许多原因。虽然像佩吉生病这类情况是由存有选择的，但个体总是被留待自行解决其困境。例如，完全康复、疾病或早逝，并非由存有预先注定。整体情境是根据深层内在牵连而设立的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: So choices between various alternatives are narrow on your level because of other limitations set by the entity itself. In other words, the entity, using its own-- mark the Mark: Mark has arrived. This is a little instance in which Ruburt did not block me. Let your friend in and request that he be seated.
quotes.translation: 因此，由于存有本身设定的其他限制，你们层面上的各种选择余地变得狭窄。换言之，存有运用其自身的——注意标记：马克到了。这是鲁柏没有阻挡我的一个小例子。请让你的朋友进来，并请他入座。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: These fundamental laws are followed on many levels in your own universe. So far I have given you but one, which is value fulfillment. In your physical universe this rule is followed as physical growth. The entity follows it through the cycle of [simultaneous] reincarnations. The species of mankind, and all other species in your universe on your particular horizontal plane, follow this law [value fulfillment] under the auspices of evolution (my emphasis).5 In other camouflage realities, this law is carried through in different manners, but it is never ignored.
quotes.translation: 这些基本法则在你们宇宙的许多层面上被遵循。到目前为止，我只给了你们一条法则，即价值完成。在你们的物质宇宙中，这条法则以物质成长的形式被遵循。存有通过[同时]转世循环来遵循它。在你们特定的水平层面上，人类物种及你们宇宙中的所有其他物种，都在演化的庇护下遵循这条法则（我的强调）。在其他伪装实相中，这条法则以不同方式被贯彻，但从未被忽视。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I have mentioned, for example, what you may think of as infinite building blocks or pyramids of comprehension, and these could not operate within your physical universe, as the basic gestalt freedom is severely limited. This is also one of the reasons why whole entities, as whole entities, do not exist in your field, but only separate, partially disconnected portions.
quotes.translation: 例如，我曾提到你们可能视为无限积木或理解金字塔的东西，这些无法在你们的物质宇宙中运作，因为基本的完形自由受到严重限制。这也是为什么整个存有作为整体存有并不存在于你们场域中的原因之一——只存在分离、部分断连的片段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now in your dreams you often visit other such realities, but you have not learned to organize your perception, or direct it. If entities like myself form the background of your own existence, so do entities like yourselves act as the background psychological structures in which other such organizations exist. There is always a give-and-take in all such relationships.
quotes.translation: 现在，在你们的梦境中，你们常拜访其他这类实相，但你们尚未学会组织自己的感知或引导它。如果像我这样的存有构成你们自身存在的背景，那么像你们这样的存有也充当着其他这类组织赖以存在的背景心理结构。在所有这类关系中，始终存在着一种施与受的互动。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The fact is that your plane originated because enough entities needed certain types of experience to warrant such a creation, and they set about forming it through the process of evolution. That I believe you understand. The smallest minute first portion represented the will and vitality of all the entities that would ever dwell upon the earth that would come after.
quotes.translation: 事实是，你们的层面之所以起源，是因为有足够多的存有需要特定类型的经验来证明这种创造的合理性，于是它们通过演化过程着手形成它。我相信这一点你们是理解的。最初的最小微粒代表了所有将随后居住在地球上的存有的意志与生命力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This out ego, among its purposes, has the duty of expressing not only itself but to a lesser extent those various hidden personalities which compose the subconscious. In larger terms and in more comprehensive terms, the whole self, the whole field of the complete subconscious and inner self, reaches back to the entity. There is no end to the past projection or existence of the subconscious of any given self; and though it is not understood in your field, there is no end to the forward thrust of the subconscious of any given self.
quotes.translation: 这个外在自我，在其诸多目的中，不仅负有表达自身的职责，也在较小程度上负有表达构成潜意识的那些各种隐藏人格的职责。从更宏观、更全面的角度来看，整个自我、完整潜意识与内在自我的整个领域，都回溯到存有。任何特定自我的潜意识，其过去的投射或存在都没有尽头；尽管在你们的场域中这一点不被理解，但任何特定自我的潜意识向前推进也没有尽头。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You however do have free will, for while the entity's psychic structure can be compared to the body, it is a part of and inhabits far greater dimensions. All of this may seem to have little to do with your personal reality. Yet your daily experience is as connected with your self or entity (abruptly louder, briefly), as it is with the cells of your physical form.
quotes.translation: 然而你们确实拥有自由意志，因为虽然存有的心灵结构可以比作身体，但它却是更宏大维度的一部分并栖居其中。这一切或许看似与你们的个人实相关系不大。然而，你们的日常体验与你们自己或存有的关联，就如同与你们物质形态的细胞一样紧密（突然提高音量，短暂地）。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I will have more to say, per usual. I suggest your break, and keep in mind that I will speak more on the construction of the entity, the tree analogy being a good one, because all of our imaginary seeds do not develop into trees. This does not necessarily mean, either, that there is a deficiency; merely that the consciousness involved does not choose for one reason or another to materialize fully in a particular form, or to develop any given abilities along certain lines. This may also represent a needed resting point.
quotes.translation: 照例，我还会说更多。我建议你们休息一下，并记住我将进一步谈论存有的构造，树木的比喻很恰当，因为我们所有想象中的种子并不会都长成树木。这也不一定意味着存在缺陷；仅仅是所涉及的意识出于某种原因，选择不完全以特定形式物质化，或沿着特定路线发展任何给定能力。这也可能代表一个必要的休息点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I evolved to form my own entity. Ruburt will also, but he is not at that stage yet, in your terms. In another frame of reference he is, of course. He also contains those portions of himself that are less developed, for they all exist as one. All the parts of himself are aware of this correspondence. In your terms only, I could be referred to -- and I have told Ruburt this -- as a sixth self of his in his future; but this is only to get the idea across, for he will not become what I am. That is impossible. I am myself.
quotes.translation: 我进化形成了自己的存有。鲁柏也会如此，但用你们的话说，他尚未达到那个阶段。当然，在另一个参考框架中，他已经达到了。他也包含那些发展程度较低的部分自己，因为它们都作为一个整体存在。他自己的所有部分都知晓这种对应关系。仅用你们的话来说，我可以被称作——我告诉过鲁柏这一点——他未来中的第六个自己；但这只是为了传达概念，因为他不会变成我现在的样子。那是不可能的。我就是我自己。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This is some material that we have not given you, lest the implications lead you to thoughts of insignificance. But you are not simply receivers, you are also givers. As your own universe was formed by entities that you do not presently understand, so the discards of your own consciousness form realities for entities that are scarcely aware of your existence.
quotes.translation: 这是一些我们尚未给你们的资料，以免其含义导致你们产生微不足道的想法。但你们不仅仅是接收者，你们也是给予者。正如你们自己的宇宙是由你们目前尚不了解的存有所形成，你们自己意识的废弃之物也为几乎意识不到你们存在的存有形成了实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In dreaming, such a dissociated state as Ruburt reached is of course the rule, only here the ability is used to form the dream images. But these dream images work for the entity as a whole and serve as a means for the various personalities to communicate. That is, in many cases for the previous incarnated personalities to correspond with the present personality. It is a means of acquainting the present personality with its past and also of reminding it of its goals, without disturbing that blatant awake ego.
quotes.translation: 在梦境中，像鲁柏达到的那种解离状态当然是常态，只是在这里，这种能力被用来形成梦境影像。但这些梦境影像为整个存有服务，并作为各种人格沟通的手段。也就是说，在许多情况下，是让过去转世的人格与当前人格进行通信。这是一种让当前人格了解其过去并提醒其目标的方式，同时不会打扰那个醒着的、张扬的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It may form particles, but it would be itself whether or not particles existed. In the most basic of terms, almost incomprehensible in your vocabulary, energy is not divided. There can be no portions or parts of it, because it is not an entity like a pie, to be cut or divided. For purposes of discussion, however, we must say that in your terms each smallest portion -- each smallest unit of pure energy -- contains within it the propelling force toward the formation of all possible variations of itself.
quotes.translation: 它可能形成粒子，但无论粒子是否存在，它本身依然存在。用你们词汇中最基本的术语来说，能量是不可分割的，这几乎难以理解。能量没有部分或片段，因为它不像一块馅饼那样可以被切割或分开。然而，为了讨论方便，我们必须说，在你们的术语中，每一个最小的部分——每一个纯能量的最小单位——都包含着推动自身形成所有可能变体的驱动力。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is not simply that a cell suddenly "relaxes its defenses" against disease. As easily as I can, I will try to explain. A cell mirrors a psychological state. A cell exists by itself, as its own entity, but also in context with all of the other cells in the body. There are literally uncountable psychological states mixing and interchanging constantly, with the overall psychological stance being one of biological integrity (colon): The organism holds together, maintains its functions, and so forth.
quotes.translation: 这不仅仅是细胞突然“放松了对疾病的防御”。我会尽量简单地解释。一个细胞反映了一种心理状态。细胞作为自己的实体独立存在，但也与身体中所有其他细胞相关联。实际上，有数不清的心理状态在不断混合和交换，而整体的心理姿态是生物完整性（冒号）：有机体保持凝聚，维持其功能，等等。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (According to him, tonight's session after 9:52 isn't book material either, but Jane and I are presenting it here because in it Seth returns to questions I'd asked earlier in Mass Events: What about the roles played in human affairs by viruses like smallpox? As I quoted myself in the opening notes for the 840th session: "What is the real relationship between the host organism and disease?" See Session 840 itself, and certain parts of Session 841.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: I made a remark, after sessions I'm afraid, to Ruburt one evening--I couldn't resist--to the effect that you would both be better off if you would think in terms of your entities. Do not think of your entities as foreign alien individuals ready to gobble you up. Even though I speak jokingly of assimilating my poor Frank Watts, this is not the case at all.
quotes.translation: 有一次晚上，恐怕是在课程之后，我对鲁柏说了一句话——我忍不住——大意是，如果你们从自己的实体角度思考，你们会过得更好。不要把你们的实体视为准备吞噬你们的外来异类。尽管我开玩笑说我在同化我可怜的弗兰克·沃茨，但事实根本不是这样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In their materialization upon your plane, and as seen from your own camouflage perspective, you seem to be aware of new entities, but this is because of your own limited viewpoint. In your time scheme entities have had time to produce more fragmentary personalities, but in truth from your viewpoint these personalities can be seen to have changed long ago.
quotes.translation: 在你们层面的物质化中，从你们自己的伪装视角来看，你们似乎意识到新的实体，但这只是因为你们有限的视角。在你们的时间框架中，实体有时间产生更多片段人格，但事实上，从你们的视角看，这些人格早已改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The entity is putting its atoms together, busily constructing the necessary equipment, and you both aid it. It weaves into the physical structure all the knowledge it knows it will need. Truths that it has learned will be built-in, so to speak. Anything that the personality knows will be written into the chromosomal structure that you have formed for it.
quotes.translation: 实体正在把它的原子组合起来，忙碌地构建必要的设备，你们俩都在帮助它。它将它知道自己需要的所有知识编织进物理结构中。可以说，它学到的真理将被内置。人格所知道的任何东西都会被写入你们为它形成的染色体结构中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This involves on the part of the entity the use of personalities, which are in a manner capsules of itself or even compartments--part of the whole entity but neatly divided as far as memory and so forth is concerned. Nor is this the only universe which you have helped construct. This is rather difficult but you will see that it is really quite logical.
quotes.translation: 这涉及到实体对人格的使用，这些人格在某种程度上是它自身的胶囊，甚至是隔间——整体实体的一部分，但在记忆等方面被整齐地划分。这也不是你们帮助构建的唯一宇宙。这相当困难，但你们会看到它实际上非常合乎逻辑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is true that as a rule you are not aware of your whole entity, which as a rule does not reside within your boundaries. But there is no reason why you must be blind to the whole self of your present personality, which is part of your entity, and which can be glimpsed on your plane in terms of the breathing and dreaming self of which I have spoken.
quotes.translation: 诚然，通常情况下你无法意识到自己的整体存有——这个存有通常并不栖居于你的界限之内。但你没有理由必须对你当前人格的完整自我视而不见，这个自我是你存有的一部分，并且可以通过我提及的呼吸与做梦的自我，在你的层面上被瞥见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Planets have been used as planes and used again as other planes. A plane is not a cosmic location. It is oftentimes practical that entities or their various personalities visit one plane before another. This does not necessarily mean that one plane must be visited before another. A certain succession is merely more useful for the entity as a whole.
quotes.translation: 行星曾被用作层面，又被再次用作其他层面。层面并非宇宙中的位置。存有或其不同人格按顺序访问一个层面，这往往是实用的。但这并不必然意味着必须先访问一个层面才能访问另一个。某种顺序只是对整体存有更为有益。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Our entity is composed of multitudinous selves with their own identities, many of whom have worked in this behalf. Their material and messages will always be basically the same, though the circumstances and times and places of their communications may be colored accordingly.
quotes.translation: 我们的存由众多拥有自身身份的自我组成，其中许多自我曾为此事工作。他们的素材与讯息本质上始终如一，尽管其沟通的环境、时间与地点可能会相应着色。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: As the various cells maintain their individuality, as they gain in terms of value fulfillment by cooperation and still retain their uniqueness, so also do the various personalities retain their individuality and uniqueness while still cooperating to form the psychic structure of the entity, which in one context also forms them; and with this little problem I will let you take your break. There are more ways to see what is inside an egg than cracking it, as you will discover.
quotes.translation: 正如不同细胞保持其个体性，通过合作获得价值完成并仍保留其独特性，不同人格也保留其个体性与独特性，同时合作形成存有的心灵结构——在某种语境下，这个结构也塑造了他们。带着这个小问题，我让你休息片刻。你会发现，看清鸡蛋内部的方法远不止敲碎它一种。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Ruburt has changed since then, and so have I. And yet we are bound together, and no invasion occurs because in one way of speaking our psychic territory is the same. I will go into the construction of entities later. My own emotional feeling, you see, goes outward, which is away from Ruburt often, since basically we are tempted to think of ourselves as one, though actually our roots are merely the same.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏自那时起已改变，我也如此。然而我们被联结在一起，并无侵犯发生，因为从某种角度说，我们的心灵领域是相同的。我稍后会深入探讨存有的构建。你看，我自己的情感是向外延伸的，常常远离鲁柏，因为我们基本倾向于视自己为一体，尽管实际上我们的根源只是相同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There is a corresponding image, held always within the inner consciousness of those who pass out of your system. (Long pause. One of several here.) This is indelible, but not always immediately available for reference. It forms a part of the whole inner self. We would prefer that you not think of any given entire entity in terms of a physical structure, though we have ourselves used the term structure to make explanations simpler, and will probably do so again.
quotes.translation: 那些离开你们系统的人，其内在意识中始终存有一个对应的影像。（长停顿。此处为数次停顿之一。）这影像不可磨灭，但并非总能立即供参考。它构成了整体内在自我的一部分。我们更希望你避免以物质结构来思考任何给定的完整存有，尽管我们自己也使用“结构”一词以简化解释，并且可能还会再次使用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: That dream world has its own reality, its own time, which is different from your concept of time, and its own inner organization. As the entity is only partially concerned with its personalities after setting them into motion, so you are unconcerned with this dream world which you have set into motion. But it exists.
quotes.translation: 那个梦境世界拥有自己的实相、自己的时间（这与你对时间的概念不同），以及自己的内在组织。正如存有在启动其人格后只部分关注它们，你对自己启动的这个梦境世界也漠不关心，但它确实存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In all of these episodes definite emotional experience was involved. Also connected was an indefinable but unmistakable sense of familiarity. Space and time continually expand, and all probabilities of any given action are actualized in one reality or another. All of the potentials of the entity are also actualized.
quotes.translation: 在所有这些片段中，都涉及明确的情感体验。同时还有一种难以言喻却 unmistakable 的熟悉感。空间与时间不断扩展，任何特定行动的所有可能性都在某个实相中得以实现。存有的所有潜能也同样被实现了。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: （It will be remembered that Mark is the entity name for Bill Macdonnel, who has witnessed a number of sessions. Bill is in the process, incidentally, of moving out of his parents home and into a studio and apartment in downtown Elmira, where he is going to live and at the same time maintain an art gallery. It will also be recalled that in several different sessions Bill was counseled by Seth to live alone, lest he suffer a recurrence of his lung trouble.）
quotes.translation: （读者应记得马克是比尔·麦克唐纳的存有名称，他曾见证过多场课。顺便一提，比尔正搬离父母家，迁入埃尔迈拉市中心一间兼作画室的公寓，他将在那里居住并经营画廊。另需回顾的是，在数场不同的课中，赛斯曾建议比尔独居，以免肺病复发。）

quotes.text: Now, no psychological structure is easy to describe in words. Simply to explain the nature of personality as it is generally known, all kinds of terms are used: id, subconscious, ego, superego; all of these to differentiate the interweaving actions that make up the physical personality. The dreaming self is just as complicated. So you can say that certain portions of it deal with physical reality, physical manipulation, and plans; some with deeper levels of creativity and achievement that insure physical survival; some with communication, with even more extensive elements of the personality now generally unknown; some with the continuing experience and existence of what you may call the soul or overall individual entity, the true multidimensional self.
quotes.translation: 任何心理结构都难以用言语描述。仅就普遍认知的人格本质而言，人们使用了各种术语：本我、潜意识、自我、超我——所有这些术语都是为了区分构成物质人格的交织行动。做梦的自己同样复杂。因此你可以说，它的某些部分处理物质实相、物质操控与计划；某些部分涉及更深层的创造力与成就，以确保物质生存；某些部分负责沟通，涉及目前普遍未知的更广泛人格元素；某些部分则关乎你所谓灵魂或整体个体存有——即真正的多维自己——的持续经验与存在。

quotes.text: In a probable reality, a Ruburt and a Joseph now live there. In the world that you recognize as official, however, they moved into the hill house. To some extent both of them are aware of the inner processes involved in the final decision. I do not mean that they are simply familiar with the exterior thought processes involved, such as: "The hill house is better constructed," or "It has a fine view." I am speaking of deeper mechanisms of consideration (pause), in which correlations are made between interior and exterior realities. (Pause.) It is obvious that when you move from one place to another you make an alteration in space -- but you alter time as well, and you set into motion a certain psychological impetus that reaches out to affect everyone you know. (Long pause.) When a house is vacant all of the people in the neighborhood send out their own messages. To a certain extent any given inhabited area forms its own "entity." This applies to the smallest neighborhood4 and to the greatest nation. Such messages are often encountered in the dream state. Empty houses are psychic vacancies that yearn to be filled. When you move, you move into other portions of your own selfhood.5
quotes.translation: 在某个可能性实相中，一个鲁柏和一个约瑟如今住在那里。然而，在你们视为官方的世界里，他们搬进了山丘房屋。某种程度上，两人都意识到最终决定所涉及的内在过程。我并非指他们仅熟悉外在思考过程，例如："山丘房屋建造得更好"或"它视野很好"。我指的是更深层的考量机制（停顿），其中内在与外在实相之间建立了关联。（停顿。）显然，当你从一个地方搬到另一个地方时，你改变了空间——但你也改变了时间，并启动了一种心理动力，这种动力会延伸出去影响你认识的每个人。（长停顿。）当一栋房屋空置时，邻里所有人都会发出自己的讯息。某种程度上，任何有人居住的区域都会形成自己的"存有"。这适用于最小的社区和最大的国家。这类讯息常在梦境状态中被遇到。空屋是渴望被填满的心灵空缺。当你搬家时，你搬进了自己存在性的其他部分。

quotes.text: Planes can and do intermix without the knowledge of the inhabitants of the particular planes involved. I want to get away from the idea of a plane being a place. It may be in some cases but is not always. A plane may be a time. A plane, believe it or not, may be only one iota of vitality that seems to exist by itself. A plane is something apparently divided from the rest of the universe for a time and for a reason. A plane may cease to be. A plane may spring up where there was none. A plane is formed for entities as patterns for fulfillment on various levels. A plane is a climate conducive to the development of unique and particular capacities and achievements. A plane is an isolation of elements where each one is given the most possible space in which to function.
quotes.translation: 层面可以也确实会相互混合，而相关层面的居民对此毫无察觉。我想摆脱"层面是一个地方"的想法。在某些情况下它可能是，但并非总是如此。一个层面可能是一个时间。信不信由你，一个层面可能只是看似独立存在的一丁点生命力。一个层面是暂时且出于某种原因与宇宙其余部分明显分离的东西。一个层面可能不复存在。一个层面可能从无中涌现。层面是为存有形成的模式，用于在不同层次上实现圆满。层面是一种气候，有利于独特特定能力与成就的发展。层面是元素的隔离区，每个元素都被赋予最大可能空间来运作。

quotes.text: But if the interactions between or among frameworks exist for everybody, in our terms, then as far as I'm concerned they exist for each thing as well--and I do mean the so-called "inanimate." (This isn't the place to go into it, but Seth maintains that for many reasons we arbitrarily decide what's living and nonliving.) Each reincarnational self, each counterpart self and probable self has its complement of frameworks. So does the most minute living or nonliving entity and the most gigantic. So, "probably," do most of the far-out probable realities one can imagine--for I won't go so far as to deny that some probable realities may exist without such framework structures. Strange one-dimensional "flatlands" indeed! But in each case where those framework interactions operate, they help each creation, each presence, each essence or vital principle fulfill "a larger picture that the conscious mind may not be able presently to perceive." In ways I can't even begin to describe here, all frameworks must ultimately be joined within the ineffable context of All That Is.
quotes.translation: 但如果框架之间的互动对每个人都存在，以我们的说法，那么在我看来它们对每个事物也同样存在——我指的是所谓的"无生命物"。（这里不是深入探讨的地方，但赛斯坚持认为，出于许多原因，我们武断地决定了什么是活的、什么是非活的。）每个转世自我、每个对应自我和可能自我都有其框架的补充。最微小的有生命或无生命实体如此，最庞大的实体也是如此。那么，"很可能"，人们能想象的大多数遥远的可能实相也是如此——因为我不会走得太远，以至于否认某些可能实相可能在没有这种框架结构的情况下存在。奇怪的一维"平原地"确实存在！但在每种框架互动运作的情况下，它们帮助每个创造、每个存在、每个本质或生命原则实现"一个意识心目前可能无法感知的更大画面"。以我在此甚至无法开始描述的方式，所有框架最终都必须在万有不可言说的语境中结合在一起。

source_raw.title: I don't really think we can conceive of anything to be truly "alien," though, so I use the word here only to lead into the next of Seth's larger concepts that I want to mention: that of probable realities, or probabilities, as Jane and I usually say. Not only does Seth stress the constant psychic motion of reincarnational and counterpart selves upon this earth we know--but he also tells us that each of those selves can move into other or parallel realities. I quote him from Session 681 in Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality:
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: Your stated universe emerged out of that kind of interval, emerging from a master event whose true nature remains uncaptured by your definitions--so there will be places in our book where I may say that an event known to you is true and untrue at the same time, or that it is both myth and fact. And in so doing I hope to lead you toward some psychic comprehension of a kind of event far too large for your usual categories of true and false. [Perhaps], then, you will let your imaginations play upon the usual events of your world, and glimpse at least in part that greater brilliance that illuminates them, so that it leads you intuitively to a feeling for the source of events and the source of your world. The units of consciousness that I have mentioned are (underlined) that, and they do behave as I have said. They are also in other terms entities, fragments of All That Is, if you prefer--divine fragments of power and majesty, containing (pause) all of the powers of consciousness as you think of it, concentrations without substance in your terms.
quotes.translation: 你们所陈述的宇宙从那种间隙中浮现，从一个主事件中浮现，其真实本质未被你们的定义所捕捉——所以在我们的书中会有一些地方，我可能会说你们所知的一个事件同时是真实和不真实的，或者它既是神话又是事实。通过这样做，我希望引导你们对一种远大于你们通常真假类别的事件产生某种心灵理解。[也许]，那么，你们会让你们的想象力在你们世界的寻常事件上驰骋，至少部分地瞥见照亮它们的更大光辉，从而直觉地引导你们感受到事件的源头和你们世界的源头。我提到的意识单位就是（强调）那样，它们确实如我所说那样行为。用其他术语来说，它们也是实体，万有的碎片，如果你们愿意——力量和威严的神圣碎片，包含（停顿）你们所认为的意识的所有力量，以你们的说法是没有实质的浓缩。

quotes.text: I hope you see what I have done here. I have initiated the idea of motion, for true transparency is not the ability to see through but to move through. This is what I mean by fifth dimension. Now, remove the structure of the wires and cubes. Things behave as though the wires and cubes were there, but these were only constructions necessary even to those on my plane in order to make things comprehensible to our faculties, the faculties of any entity. We construct images consistent with the senses we happen to have at a particular time. I have more senses, so to speak, in operating use that is, than you have, because not only am I aware of my own plane but of yours and other parallel planes, even though I myself have not existed in some of those parallel planes.
quotes.translation: 我希望你们看到我在这里做了什么。我引入了运动的概念，因为真正的透明不是看穿的能力，而是穿越的能力。这就是我所说的第五维度。现在，移除电线和立方体的结构。事物表现得好像电线和立方体在那里，但这些只是必要的构造，甚至对我所在层面的人来说也是如此，以便使事物对我们的官能、任何实体的官能变得可理解。我们构建与我们在特定时刻恰好拥有的感官一致的图像。我有更多的感官，可以说，在运作使用中，比你们多，因为我不仅意识到我自己的层面，还意识到你们的层面和其他平行层面，尽管我自己并未存在于某些平行层面中。

quotes.text: The part that translates inner data sifts it down through the subconscious, which is a barrier and also a threshold to the present personality as it operates on the camouflage plane. I have mentioned many times how vitality changes as it approaches and forms various planes. I have said that the topmost part of the subconscious contains personal memories. That beneath these are racial memories and so forth. Things are simply not layered in the way I speak of them. But continuing with the necessary analogy, on the other side of （or beneath to you） the racial memories, you no longer exist within your plane, and look out upon another with the face of this other self-conscious part of you. This part receives inner data, is in contact with the entity, to some greater degree than you are in contact with your dreams, and actually directs all the important functions that you think are either automatically controlled, or unconsciously controlled.
quotes.translation: 翻译内在数据的那部分将其筛选下来，通过潜意识，这既是屏障也是门槛，通向当前人格在伪装层面上的运作。我多次提到生命力在接近和形成各个层面时如何变化。我说过潜意识的最高层包含个人记忆。在这些之下是种族记忆等等。事物并不是像我说的那样分层。但继续必要的类比，在种族记忆的另一边（或对你们来说是下方），你们不再存在于你们的层面内，而是用你们这个其他自我意识部分的面孔向外看着另一个层面。这个部分接收内在数据，与实体保持联系，其程度比你们与你们的梦的联系更大，并且实际指导所有你们认为要么自动控制、要么无意识控制的重要功能。

quotes.text: I do not believe that Dunne understood this. There is no serialization as he imagined, after a certain point, simply because this progression of selves through various times in a serial fashion is no longer necessary. The selves reach a point which is not a theoretical point, but a particular mathematically existent point, whereby these times and selves simply become one, or in our terms, an entity. I must stress that individuality is never lost. But this is too complicated a subject to cover this evening. We have explained it rather adequately in terms of action however, and gestalts of selves do not imply a giving-up of individuality at all. It should be remembered here that reincarnation is simply a fact, and one which is not accepted by Priestley or Dunne.
quotes.translation: 我不认为邓恩理解这一点。没有他想象的那种序列化，在某个点之后，仅仅是因为这种自我以序列方式穿越各种时间的进程不再必要。自我达到一个点，这不是一个理论点，而是一个特定的数学上存在的点，通过这些点，这些时间和自我简单地合而为一，或者用我们的说法，成为一个实体。我必须强调，个体性从未丧失。但这是一个太复杂的话题，今晚无法涵盖。然而，我们用行动的概念相当充分地解释了它，自我的完形绝不意味着放弃个体性。这里应该记住，转世只是一个事实，一个普里斯特利和邓恩都不接受的事实。

quotes.text: There are a few points that I would like to make of a general nature. Ruburt has been reading Jung, though not consistently. The libido does not originate in the individual subconscious of the present personality. It originates instead in the energy of the entity and inner self, and is directed by means of the inner senses, outward so to speak, through the deeper layers of the individual subconscious mind, then through the outer or personal layers.
quotes.translation: 我想提出几个一般性的要点。鲁柏一直在读荣格，尽管不是持续地。力比多并非起源于当前人格的个人潜意识。相反，它起源于实体和内在自我的能量，并通过内在感官，可以说是向外，通过个人潜意识的更深层，然后通过外层或个人层来引导。

quotes.text: The self, the whole self, the entity, that is your true self, does indeed exist now. You are even in contact with it now. It is true that in one sense you have never left this self. It is also true that in another sense you have indeed. Your have purposefully explored other systems as you explore this one.
quotes.translation: 自我、整体自我、存有，也就是你的真实自我，确实存在于当下。你现在甚至与它保持着联系。从某种意义上说，你确实从未离开过这个自我。但从另一种意义上说，你确实离开了。你像探索这个系统一样，有目的地探索了其他系统。

quotes.text: If the overall entity feels that the problem has been sufficiently solved, then it will end this life situation. But there is also a connection here with John, and the wife's personality will not leave until John has also sufficiently achieved all benefits from the relationship that h is entity hoped for.
quotes.translation: 如果整体存有认为问题已充分解决，那么它就会结束这一生的情境。但这里也与约翰有关联，妻子的个性不会离开，直到约翰也充分实现了他的存有希望从这段关系中获得的全部益处。

quotes.text: To a certain extent, I must travel from those realities into your comprehension, wrest myself free in order to form an ever-changing, ever-moving, ever-on-the-move entity that can speak here and be there at the same time. So I am distant and close at once. That distance from you also represents the reaches, however, of the human psyche, and the vast corridors of psychological activity from which it is formed, and from which your world emerges.
quotes.translation: 在某种程度上，我必须从那些实相中进入你的理解范围，挣脱自身，以便形成一个不断变化、不断移动、永不停歇的存有，能够同时在此处说话又在那里存在。所以我既遥远又亲近。然而，那与你的距离也代表着人类心灵所能触及的范围，以及构成它的心理活动的广阔走廊，你们的世界也从那里涌现。

Consciously you work with what you call a one reality field psychological structure. Other portions of your entire entity are not so limited.
quotes.translation: 这些点、这些坐标，环绕着你们，不断冲击着你们的物质形态和宇宙，但你们无法理解或感知它们。在意识层面，你们与所谓的单一实相场心理结构打交道。你们整个存有的其他部分则不受如此限制。

quotes.text: The entity sees the whole event, the whole person-event, with the time element, or age in your terms, as simply another characteristic or dimension. The person-event is not cut off, however. Its greater reality simply cannot appear within three dimensions. It is instead composed of atoms and molecules that you do not perceive, both above and below the physical range of intensities -- and all of these in their own way possess consciousness.
quotes.translation: 存有看到整个事件、整个"人-事件"，以你们的时间元素或年龄，仅仅作为另一个特征或维度。然而，"人-事件"并未被切断。它的更大实相根本无法在三维空间中显现。相反，它由你们无法感知的原子和分子组成，这些原子和分子既在物理强度范围之上，也在其之下——而它们都以自己的方式拥有意识。

quotes.text: First of all, a soul is not something that you have. It is what you are. I usually use the term "entity" in preference to the term "soul," simply because those particular misconceptions are not so connected with the word "entity," and its connotations are less religious in an organizational sense.
quotes.translation: 首先，灵魂不是你所拥有的东西。它就是你所是的。我通常更倾向于使用"存有"一词而非"灵魂"，仅仅是因为那些特定的误解与"存有"这个词关联较少，而且它在组织意义上的宗教内涵也较少。

quotes.text: The entity, the true multidimensional self, is aware of all of its experiences, and this knowledge is to some extent available to these other portions of the self, including of course the physical self as you know it. These various portions of the self in fact will eventually (in your terms) become fully aware. Period. This awareness will automatically alter what now seems to be their nature, and add to the multiplicitude of existence.
quotes.translation: 存有，即真正的多重次元自体，觉察到它所有的经验，而这份知识在某种程度上也能被自体的其他部分所获取，当然也包括你所知的物质自体。事实上，自体的这些不同部分最终（以你们的时间观而言）会变得完全觉察。句号。这种觉察会自动改变它们目前看似本质的东西，并增添存在的多样性。

quotes.text: As all of this occurred, consciousness took on more and more specific orientations, greater organizations at your end. At the "other end," it disentangled itself from vaster fields of activity to allow for this specific behavior. All of these units of consciousness, again, operate as entities (or particles, or as waves or forces). In those terms, consciousness formed the experience of time--and not, of course, the other way around.
quotes.translation: 当这一切发生时，意识采取了越来越具体的取向，在你们这一端形成了更大的组织。而在"另一端"，它则从更广大的活动场域中解脱出来，以允许这种具体行为。所有这些意识单位，再次强调，都作为存有（或粒子，或波，或力）运作。用那些术语来说，意识形成了时间的经验——当然，而非反过来。

quotes.text: As a rule each entity is born so that he experiences at least three roles, that of mother, father and child. I make three roles rather than two because a complete childhood, for example at least once, is usually necessary so that a personality can experience the knowledge of human growth.
quotes.translation: 通常每个存有生来都要经历至少三种角色：母亲、父亲和孩子。我设定三种角色而非两种，因为完整的童年经验（例如至少一次）通常是必要的，这样人格才能体验人类成长的知识。
