quotes.text: Now: This is a personal god, in your terms. It is a personal god because this god represents the part of that which is, which is yourself, you see. No one else can speak to this particular portion of this god. You are your own entity. The part of you that is formed from All That Is, is this god; is aware of all your needs because god is also, in this respect, yourself. Though hardly the self that you will recognize in a mirror.
quotes.translation: 现在：以你们的说法，这是一个人格化的神。它是人格化的神，因为这位神代表了"一切万有"中属于你自身的那部分，你明白吗？没有其他人能与这位神的这个特定部分对话。你就是你自己的存有。你由"一切万有"所形成的那部分，就是这位神；它觉察到你所有的需求，因为神在这方面也是你自己。尽管这绝非你在镜中会认出的那个自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The cells do not have free will in your terms. They have the innate capacity to form other organizations, but not while affiliated with you. To leave you they must change their form. To some extent you determine their "good health" within the framework of their nature. They also help maintain yours. (Pause.) In terms of consciousness, the entity or greater you knows as much more than you know, as you know more than your cells.
quotes.translation: 以你们的说法，细胞没有自由意志。它们天生具有形成其他组织的能力，但在与你关联时则不能。要离开你，它们必须改变自己的形态。在它们本性的框架内，你在某种程度上决定了它们的"健康状态"。它们也帮助维持你的健康。（停顿。）就意识而言，存有或更大的你所知的远比你多，正如你比你的细胞知道得更多。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In a manner of speaking, it can be said that you have reincarnational civilizations as well as reincarnating individuals. Each entity who is born in flesh works toward the development of those abilities that can be best nurtured and fulfilled within the physical environment. He has a responsibility to and for the civilization in which he has each existence, for he helps form it through his own thoughts, emotions, and actions.
quotes.translation: 可以说，你们既有转世的文明，也有转世的个体。每个生于肉身的存有都致力于发展那些能在物质环境中得到最佳培育和实现的能力。他对所存在的每个文明负有责任，因为他通过自己的思想、情感和行动帮助塑造了它。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You are able to think in terms of immortality through your work, rather than through physical offspring, simply because your entity has known itself in terms of the flesh. Therefore you are no longer bound or drawn to it in that fashion. This is not to say that psychic love of earthly phenomenon is not with you. It is and will be. Even on other planes the sensual nature and appreciation of the earthly habitat is maintained.
quotes.translation: 你能够通过工作而非肉身后代来思考不朽，仅仅是因为你的存有已通过肉身认识了自己。因此你不再以那种方式被束缚或吸引。这并非说你对尘世现象的心灵之爱已不复存在。它依然存在，并将永远存在。即使在别的层面，对尘世栖息地的感官本质与欣赏也得以保留。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Oswald was always a personality fragment, as all psychopaths are. As fragments of a personality break off in the manner that I explained for schizophrenics, so in some cases part of an entity reincarnates before it should, does not carry its full mental gene blueprint, and therefore causes trouble and confusion. It is as though one of the wild images of a nightmare emerged with full physical power into the world of the day.
quotes.translation: 奥斯瓦尔德始终是个人格片段，正如所有精神病患者一样。如同我解释精神分裂症时所说的人格碎片分裂方式，在某些情况下，存有的一部分在时机未成熟时便提前转世，未能携带完整的心灵基因蓝图，从而引发麻烦与混乱。这就像噩梦中的某个狂野意象突然以完整物理力量闯入白昼世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You may think of your soul or entity -- though only briefly and for the sake of this analogy -- as some conscious and living, divinely inspired computer who programs its own existences and lifetimes. But this computer is so highly endowed with creativity that each of the various personalities it programs spring into consciousness and song, and in turn create realities that may have been undreamed of by the computer itself.
quotes.translation: 你可以将你的灵魂或存有——虽仅作短暂类比——视为某种有意识、鲜活且受神圣启发的计算机，它编程自己的存在与生生世世。但这台计算机被赋予如此高度的创造力，以至于它所编程的每个不同人格都迸发出意识与歌声，进而创造出计算机自身可能从未梦想过的实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You as a physical being are also dependent upon many forces that you do not understand, so there is no contradiction in saying that the cells are individual and independent, and yet dependent upon stronger organization. There is no coercion put upon the cells, because each cell is what it is because of its innate ability and strength. Nor is there any coercion as far as a personality is concerned, which is a part of an entity. There are laws of development, which are the only real laws, and which govern such matters. Or really, such matters govern themselves. When capabilities grow there are ways of further growth which become open.
quotes.translation: 作为物质存在的你同样依赖许多你不了解的力量，因此说细胞既独立自主又依赖更强组织并无矛盾。细胞未受任何强制，因为每个细胞之所以成为它自己，皆因其先天能力与力量。就作为存有一部分的人格而言，同样不存在强制。存在发展法则——这是唯一真正的法则——统御此类事务。或者更确切地说，此类事务自行统御。当能力成长时，进一步发展的途径便会开启。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: On many other planes the vitality expresses itself in ways incomprehensible to you and at this point to me. The personality-entity concept involves only one main type process involving many planes and plane groups. But this is not All That Is or exists. It is extremely possible that many in the personality-existence grouping have been involved within other completely different plane groupings in some inconceivable past.
quotes.translation: 在众多其他层面，生命力以你此刻无法理解的方式表达自身，对我而言亦然。人格-存有概念仅涉及包含许多层面与层面群组的一种主要过程类型。但这并非一切万有或存在的一切。极有可能的是，人格-存在群组中的许多成员，在某个难以想象的过去，曾参与过其他完全不同的层面群组。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In your visions you are in contact with your entity. Your entity is merely a part of yourself with which you are not completely familiar.
quotes.translation: 在你的异象中，你正与你的存有接触。你的存有不过是你自身中你尚未完全熟悉的那部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now, in the three-dimensional reality in which your ego has its main focus, becoming presupposes arrival, or a destination -- an ending to that which has been in a state of becoming. But the soul or entity has its existence basically in other dimensions, and in these, fulfillment is not dependent upon arrivals at any points, spiritual or otherwise.
quotes.translation: 现在，在你自我意识主要聚焦的三维实相中，"成为"预设了抵达或终点——即处于"成为"状态之事的终结。但灵魂或存有本质上存在于其他维度，在这些维度中，圆满并不依赖于抵达任何精神层面或其他层面的节点。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (From the 54th session for May 18, 1964:) Your Ruburt was, indeed, Seth ... I have promised to give you more material dealing with the psychic construction of the entity, and its relationship with its various [physical] personalities. In the beginning, I could not tell you in so many words that Ruburt is myself, because you would have leaped to the conclusion that I was Ruburt's subconscious mind, and this is not so.
quotes.translation: （摘自1964年5月18日第54节课：）你的鲁柏确实是赛斯……我曾承诺提供更多关于存有心灵结构及其与各个[物质]人格关系的资料。起初我不能直接告诉你鲁柏就是我，因为你会立刻断定我是鲁柏的潜意识，但事实并非如此。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Those who have left it have evolved into the mental entities that they always were, you see. They have discarded material form. This group of entities still takes a great interest in earth. They lend it support and energy. In a way, they could be thought of now as earth gods.
quotes.translation: 那些已离开的人已进化成他们始终所是的灵性存有，你看。他们已摒弃物质形态。这群存有仍对地球怀有浓厚兴趣。他们给予地球支持与能量。从某种角度看，他们如今可被视为大地之神。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: With his superior knowledge the entity must leave hands off. His, the entity's, only hope is to allow the personality complete independence, for it is the personality who understands more clearly than he the conditions of the particular plane upon which his existence happens.
quotes.translation: 凭借其卓越知识，存有必须保持不干预。存有唯一的希望是允许人格完全独立，因为正是人格比存有更清楚理解其存在所发生的特定层面的条件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: To a lesser degree, you function along these lines in varying roles when you exist simultaneously as a member of a family, a member of a community, a nation, and as an artist or a writer. As you attempt to use your abilities so does the entity attempt to use his abilities, and he organizes his various personalities and to some extent directs their activities while still allowing them what you would call free will.
quotes.translation: 在较小程度上，当你同时作为家庭成员、社区成员、国家公民以及艺术家或作家存在时，你也在不同角色中按此模式运作。正如你试图运用自身能力，存有也试图运用其能力，它组织各个不同人格，并在某种程度上引导他们的活动，同时仍允许他们拥有你们所谓的自由意志。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: These are unfoldings, as the inner self materializes what is already latent into physical actuality. Now there may be areas in which the inner self is simply not interested. There may be areas in which it is simply less proficient. The inner self is a developing entity, not a finished product. The whole idea of physical reality, individually speaking, is the emergence of experience within your particular system.
quotes.translation: 这些是展开的过程，如同内在自我将已潜藏的事物物质化为物理实相。可能存在内在自我根本不感兴趣的领域。也可能存在它不太擅长的领域。内在自我是一个发展中的存有，而非成品。就个体而言，整个物理实相的概念，就是在你特定系统内经验的涌现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There are personalities however to whom it is highly alien. It must be interpreted. Using concepts, I can relate my understanding of your time pattern to others clairvoyantly. Other portions of my entity are aware of it, by a process of mental osmosis, so to speak.
quotes.translation: 然而，有些人格对此感到极为陌生。它必须被诠释。通过运用概念，我可以将我对你们时间模式的理解以千里眼的方式传达给其他人。我存有的其他部分则通过一种精神渗透的过程（姑且如此说）来感知它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Such communication between these various selves who compose an entity is natural, continuous. The ego does not perceive the communications, obviously; but the ego, you must understand, is not self one alone, it is only a portion of self one, or the physical self.
quotes.translation: 构成一个存有的这些不同自我之间的这种沟通是自然且持续的。自我显然无法感知这些沟通；但你必须明白，自我并非唯一的自己，它只是自己一或物质自己的一个部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: As you know, other portions of the self are intensely focused elsewhere. Before physical birth, you have already made the decision to choose this probable reality, and to probe its potentials. The entity is therefore learning to realign its methods of perception.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，自己的其他部分正强烈地聚焦于别处。在物质出生之前，你已经做出决定选择这个可能实相，并探索其潜能。因此，存有正在学习重新调整其感知方法。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In the beginning CU's, then, units of consciousness, existing within a divine psychological gestalt, endowed with the unimaginable creativity of that sublime identity, began themselves to create, to explore, and to fulfill those innate values by which they were characterized. Operating both as waves and particles, directed in part by their own creative restlessness, and directed in part by the unquenchable creativity of All That Is, they embarked upon the project that brought time and space and your entire [universe] into being. They were the first entities, then.
quotes.translation: 起初，意识单位（CU）存在于一个神圣的心理完形之内，被赋予了那崇高本体的难以想象的创造力，它们开始自己创造、探索并实现那些构成其特性的内在价值。它们既以波又以粒子的方式运作，部分受其自身创造性的不安所引导，部分受一切万有无可抑制的创造力所引导，从而展开了那个带来时间、空间以及你们整个[宇宙]的计划。它们便是最初的存有。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Sometimes such cases are handled within another framework, in which Augustus would be considered possessed by an independent "evil" entity whenever Augustus Two took over. Now again, if Augustus somehow changed his beliefs it is possible that even within that framework some kind of cure would be effected. But at the same time the dangers and difficulties would make such a cure relatively impossible.
quotes.translation: 有时这类案例会在另一个架构内处理，其中奥古斯都二世接管时，奥古斯都便被视为被一个独立的“邪恶”存有所附身。再说一次，如果奥古斯都设法改变其信念，即使在这个架构内，某种疗愈也有可能实现。但同时，危险与困难将使这种疗愈相对不可能。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Because the entity has not expressed but withheld the basic femininity of its nature, it has fed back upon itself so that the overall identity of the entity appears as feminine simply because there is a backlog of those characteristics thought of as feminine.
quotes.translation: 由于该存有并未表达而是压抑了其本性的基本阴性特质，它便反作用于自身，以至于该存有的整体身份显得是阴性的，仅仅是因为那些被视为阴性的特征积压过多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Again, there are many others like us. We attempt to translate realities into terms that you can comprehend. We change our face and form but we are always the one. We are therefore always a part of the one entity which is the Seth entity. (Long pause at 9:30.)
quotes.translation: 再次强调，还有许多像我们这样的存有。我们试图将实相转译成你能理解的术语。我们变换面容与形态，但我们始终是同一个。因此我们始终是赛斯本体这个整体存有的一部分。（9:30处长时间停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: If your mother or father found continued life together completely unbearable, which incidentally they do not, then in all likelihood one of their entities would suggest through the inner senses that the relationship be discontinued. If the advice was not heeded, and as the situation grew worse, a danger point would arise beyond which the personalities could not safely continue their association.
quotes.translation: 倘若你父母发现共同生活完全无法忍受——顺便一提，他们并非如此——那么他们的某个本体极可能通过内在感官建议终止这段关系。若此建议未被采纳，随着情况恶化，将出现危险临界点，超越此点后人格便无法安全维持关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I have explained somewhat earlier how the gestalt ego consciousness was formed, and to some degree explained its psychic composition, but there is much more to be said here. There is a steady and unwavering cooperation that exists, and it is the basis of your physical universe. You do not see this cooperation. Your senses are rather more equipped to notice difference and divergence than sameness; but nevertheless the cooperation of all conscious entities provides physical objects with whatever appearance of permanence they have.
quotes.translation: 我先前已部分解释过完形自我意识如何形成，并在某种程度上说明了其心灵构成，但此处仍有更多可探讨之处。存在一种稳定且不变的协作，它是你们物质宇宙的基础。你们看不见这种协作。你们的感官更擅长觉察差异与分歧而非同一性；然而所有意识本体的协作，为物质对象提供了它们所拥有的任何表面上的恒常性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: That is, not only would they be aware of what seems to you to be past, present and future within your system, but they would be aware of several other systems and be able to function within them simultaneously, gaining and creating experience within all of these systems, even while maintaining overall identity. They would be conscious, for example, of themselves as, say, an entity, and simultaneously they would be aware of separate existences as individuals in various systems. This is as far as we can carry this at present.
quotes.translation: 也就是说，他们不仅会意识到你们系统中看似过去、现在与未来的事物，还会觉察到其他多个系统，并能在这些系统中同时运作，在所有系统中获取并创造经验，同时维持整体身份认同。举例而言，他们会意识到自己作为本体的存在，同时也会觉察到作为个体在不同系统中的独立存在。目前我们只能阐述至此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There is no invasion involved in these sessions, as I have told you often. I have promised to give you more material dealing with the psychic construction of the entity, and its relationship to its fragments. I could not tell you in the beginning in so many words that Ruburt is myself, because you would have leaped to the conclusion that I was Ruburt's subconscious mind, and this is not so.
quotes.translation: 正如我常告诉你们的，这些课程中不存在任何侵犯。我承诺过会提供更多关于本体心灵结构及其与分体关系的资料。我无法在开始时直截了当地告诉你们鲁柏就是我，因为你们会立刻得出结论说我是鲁柏的潜意识，但事实并非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You must simply and practically try to divest yourself of all ideas of time as you know it, for this discussion. Basically, what you call time does not exist. I am trying to tell you what does exist instead. The question of time and entities then, you see, cannot be truly answered in the manner in which you asked it.
quotes.translation: 进行这场讨论时，你们必须简单而实际地摆脱所有关于时间的既有观念。从根本上说，你们所谓的时间并不存在。我正试图告诉你们实际存在的是什么。那么，关于时间与本体的问题，你们看，无法用你们提问的方式来真正回答。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Otis (my father's father) was a woman, born in India two years after Otis's death, and dying at a young age in her early teens. (Long pause.) He will have other reincarnations, and will eventually in your terms become a strong entity on his own. He will indeed greet your father. They had been brothers, and your father somewhat resented the change in relationship even while he chose it.
quotes.translation: 奥蒂斯（我父亲的父亲）曾是个女性，在奥蒂斯死后两年出生于印度，并在十几岁早逝。（长停顿。）他会有其他转世，最终按你们的说法会成为独立的强大存有。他确实会迎接你的父亲。他们曾是兄弟，而你父亲即便选择了这种关系转变，仍对此有些不满。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This inner sense is not only an important one but is immensely beneficial, and is not misused in any way by those able to use it. Very simply, these senses do not function until they can be handled correctly. This sense in no way involves invasion. It does not imply that one entity can control another. It merely involves direct, instantaneous cognition of the essence of living tissue.
quotes.translation: 这种内在感知不仅重要且极为有益，任何能运用它的人都绝不会误用。简单来说，这些感知只有在能被正确掌控时才会运作。这种感知绝不涉及侵犯，也不意味着某个存有能控制另一个。它仅是对活组织本质的直接、即时认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You have read of so-called mediums--and I detest the term--speaking gibberish, the explanation being given that the so-called spirit could not come through. Nevertheless so-called gibberish in such an instance merely represents, when it is legitimate, the fact that no new comprehensions or knowledge can be so transmitted entirely by the means of an entity speaking from another plane.
quotes.translation: 你读过所谓灵媒——我厌恶这个术语——胡言乱语的记载，解释称所谓灵体无法完全通传。然而当这种所谓胡言乱语属实时，它仅代表：没有任何新领悟或知识能完全通过另一个层面的存有以这种方式传递。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: As I mentioned in Seth Speaks, the Christ entity was too great to be contained in any one man, or for that matter in any one time, so the man you think of as Christ was not crucified (See chapters Twenty-one and Twenty-two of Seth Speaks.)
quotes.translation: 正如我在《赛斯书》中提到的，基督存有过于宏大，无法被任何一人或任何一时所容纳，因此你们认为的基督并未被钉十字架（参见《赛斯书》第二十一、二十二章）。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This personality will refer to the historical Christ, will recognize his relationship with that personality; but within him the three personality groupings will form a new psychic entity, a different psychological gestalt. As this metamorphosis takes place, it will initiate a metamorphosis on a human level also (emphatically), as man's inner abilities are accepted and developed.
quotes.translation: 这个人格将指涉历史上的基督，认知自身与那人格的关联；但在他之内，三个人格群体会形成新的心灵存有，一种不同的心理完形。当这种蜕变发生时，它也将引发人类层面的蜕变（强调地），随着人类内在能力被接纳与发展。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Time therefore is formed out of and from nontime. (Long pause.) Nontime is psychological experience, psychological reality, and time is always at its service. (Long pause.) Entities then form the time in which they seem to dwell. (Long pause.) Experience itself is always plastic, and again, form is not dependent upon mass. Mass belongs to your camouflage system. Form does not.
quotes.translation: 因此时间由非时间形成并源自非时间。（长停顿。）非时间是心理体验、心理实相，时间始终为其服务。（长停顿。）存有们于是构建出他们看似栖居的时间。（长停顿。）体验本身始终可塑，再次强调，形态不依赖于质量。质量属于你们的伪装系统，形态则不然。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You will help to create something in the hearts of men that will not be there until they see your work. This is your commitment. This is the time for it. If you are to be an entity, as you have chosen to be, then this is your opportunity, and this is your last reincarnation upon this earth. You need power, strength, determination, and joyous spontaneity in your working hours.
quotes.translation: 你们将协助在人类心中创造出某种东西，那东西要等他们看到你们的作品才会存在。这是你们的承诺，也是此刻的时机。如果你们要成为如自己所选择的那样的存有，这便是你们的机会，也是你们在地球上的最后一次转世。你们需要力量、毅力、决心，以及工作时充满喜悦的自发性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The resulting thoughts and images in turn are expressed and affect others, and not only symbolically. As you should know, mental acts have an electromagnetic reality which directly affects the inner self, which directly forms the constantly changing nature of the inner self. For the inner self is, after all, composed of mental actions, and the entity itself is ever-changing.
quotes.translation: 由此产生的思想和意象反过来被表达并影响他人，且不仅限于象征层面。如你们所知，心智活动具有电磁实相，直接影响内在自体，直接塑造内在自体不断变化的本质。毕竟内在自体由心智行动构成，而存有本身也在永恒变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You possess within yourself all of those potentials in which consciousness creatively takes part. The cell does not need to be consciously aware of you in order to fulfill itself, even though your expectations of health largely influence its existence, but your recognition of the soul and entity can help you direct energies from these other dimensions into your daily life.
quotes.translation: 你们自身内在拥有意识创造性参与的所有潜能。细胞无需有意识地认知你便能实现自身，尽管你对健康的期望极大影响着它的存续，但你对灵魂与存有的认知，能帮助你将这些其他维度的能量导向日常生活。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: With these precepts no one can find fault. It is true that the outward manifestations of the libido are directed toward the physical world, but until the source of the libido is seen and studied and known to exist, not in the topmost subconscious layers of the individual, and not even in the racial subconscious, but within the entity itself, then man will not know himself.
quotes.translation: 遵循这些准则，无人能指摘。诚然，力比多的外在表现指向物质世界，但除非力比多的源头被看见、被研究、被认知为存在于——并非个体最表层的潜意识层，甚至非种族潜意识层，而是存有自身之内——否则人类将无法认识自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I can see that my analogy comparing the soul to an organ within a multidimensional psychic structure of the entity is confusing you. We will clear it up by comparing the same properties, changing the word "soul" to read "oversoul."
quotes.translation: 我能看出我将灵魂比作存有多维心灵结构中的器官这个类比令你困惑。我们将通过比较相同属性来澄清这一点，将"灵魂"一词改为"超灵"。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The personality itself, as you know, is a gestalt of action, and as such it is necessary that the flow of action within it follow the overall directives of the entity and the inner self. When for example the ego is allowed to apply too tightly and too rigorously its inhibitory functions, then this freedom of action within the personality is seriously divided and impeded.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，人格本身是行动完形，因此其内部行动之流必须遵循存有与内在自体的整体指令。例如当自我被允许过度严苛地施加抑制功能时，人格内部的行动自由便会严重分裂受阻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: In other terms you could also say that an entity visits all planes simultaneously, as it is possible for you to visit one particular state, one particular county, one particular city at one time. Also you might visit the state of sorrow and joy almost simultaneously, and experience both emotions in heightened state because of the almost immediate contrast between them.
quotes.translation: 换个说法，你也可以说一个存有同时探访所有层面，如同你有可能在同一时间探访某个州、某个县、某个城市。你也可能几乎同时探访悲伤与喜悦的状态，并因两者近乎直接的对比而体验到这两种情绪的强化状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: There can be in your terms some loss of memory, complications that confuse the knowledge of origin. When the situation does occur, there is always a division of forces, some entities returning to form, and others not entering the process. These watch, keeping their memories and knowledge intact, and acting as directors, against whose memories the new models are formed.
quotes.translation: 以你们的说法，可能会有记忆的丧失、混淆起源知识的复杂性。当这种情况发生时，总会有力量的分裂，一些存有回归形态，而其他存有不进入这个过程。这些存有旁观，保持其记忆和知识完整无缺，并充当导演，新模型根据其记忆而形成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The inner ego is then this inner identity. It is closely allied with the entity, and connects a reality that is purely psychic, the reality of the entity, with a reality that is mainly physical, the reality of the physical self.
quotes.translation: 内在自我便是这个内在身份。它与存有紧密相连，并将纯粹心灵的现实——存有的现实，与主要物质的现实——物质自我的现实连接起来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Before we close I want to mention the importance of the third inner sense with the experience of concept patterns. The third inner sense, involving what you would call perception of past, present and future, is the sense that enables the inner ego and entities to experience direct concept-patterns, and free them therefore from successive cause and effect limitations.
quotes.translation: 在结束之前，我想提及第三内在感官在体验概念模式时的重要性。第三内在感官涉及你们所谓的过去、现在和未来的感知，是使内在自我和存有能够直接体验概念模式，从而摆脱连续因果限制的感官。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: In your physical universe this rule is followed as physical growth. The entity follows this rule through the cycle of reincarnations. The species of mankind, and all other species in your universe on your particular horizontal plane, follow this law under the auspices of evolution. On other planes this law is carried through in other manners, but it is never ignored.
quotes.translation: 在你们的物质宇宙中，这一法则表现为物质成长。存有通过转世循环遵循这一法则。人类物种以及你们宇宙中特定水平层面上的所有其他物种，在进化的庇护下遵循这一法则。在其他层面上，这一法则以其他方式贯彻，但从未被忽视。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: While it may not seem so at the present, the greatest gift I can give you is to reaffirm the integrity of your own being. I say this also because I am aware of your present status even as other portions of your own entity are.
quotes.translation: 虽然现在可能看起来并非如此，但我能给予你们的最大礼物是重申你们自身存在的完整性。我这样说也是因为我意识到你们当前的状态，正如你们自身存有的其他部分所意识到的那样。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Then see this image exploding into your own consciousness, which is unbelievably bright. Realize that it is a portion of a far greater multidimensional structure, spread out in an even richer dimension. Feel the entity sending you energy as you send energy to your cells. Let it fill your being and then direct it physically any place within your body that you choose.
quotes.translation: 接着观想这影像爆炸式地进入你自己的意识，那意识明亮得难以置信。要明白它只是某个更宏大多维结构的一部分，在更丰富的维度中延展。感受存有向你输送能量，如同你向自身细胞输送能量一般。让这能量充满你的存在，然后将其导向你身体内任何你选择的部位。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: For example, the main character in a religious historical drama may or may not consciously be aware of the ways in which such information is given to him. And yet it may seem to him that he does know, for the nature of a dogma's origin will be explained in terms that this main character can understand. The historical Jesus knew who he was, but he also knew that he was one of three personalities composing one entity. To a large extent he shared in the memory of the other two.
quotes.translation: 例如，宗教历史剧中的主角可能未必有意识地知晓这些信息以何种方式传递给他。然而他或许自认为知晓，因为教义起源的本质会以主角能理解的方式被阐释。历史上的耶稣知晓自己的身份，但他也明白自己是构成同一存有的三个人格之一。在很大程度上，他共享着另外两位的记忆。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: These CU's can operate as separate entities, as identities, or they can flow together in a vast, harmonious wave of activity, as a force. Period. Actually, units of consciousness operate in both ways all of the time. No identity, once "formed," is ever annihilated, for its existence is indelibly a part of "the entire wave of consciousness to which it belongs."
quotes.translation: 这些意识单位既能作为独立存有、独立身份运作，也能如浩瀚和谐的波动般汇聚成一股力量。句号。实际上，意识单位始终以两种方式同时运作。任何身份一旦"形成"便永不湮灭，因其存在已不可磨灭地成为"所属整体意识波动"的一部分。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: They have evolved beyond all probabilities as we understand them, yet outside of probabilities they still have existence. (Pause.) This simply cannot be explained in words. (Pause.)They form energy sources. Yet also all of this and all of probabilities does not minimize nor deny the individual, for it is the individual upon whom all else rests, and it is from the basis of the individual that all entities have their existence, and from which all kinds of evolutions spring.
quotes.translation: 它们已进化超越我们所理解的所有或然性，然而在或然性之外它们依然存在。（停顿）这实在无法用言语解释。（停顿）它们形成能量源。但这一切与所有或然性并不会削弱或否定个体，因为万物皆立足于个体，所有存有皆源于个体之基，各类进化亦由此生发。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You are familiar through your reading with so-called secondary personalities. There have been cases of individuals with three separate personalities. Now this idea comes close to the relationship of the entity to its personalities. They are independent to varying degrees, and they operate on various planes for purposes of overall fulfillment and development.
quotes.translation: 你通过阅读已熟悉所谓的次人格。曾有案例显示个体拥有三个分离的人格。这个概念已接近存有与其人格之间的关系。它们在不同程度上保持独立，为达成整体圆满与发展的目的而在不同层面运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You must also realize that the entity who became her son also chose the circumstances, knowing of them in advance, for his own purposes. There are many character aspects to be considered here. For if each personality is an energy gestalt, then also each family group is also an energy gestalt. The actions and interactions form its characteristics and nature.
quotes.translation: 你还必须明白，成为她儿子的那位存有也预先知晓并选择了这些境遇，自有其目的。此处需考量诸多角色面向。因为若每个人格都是能量完形，那么每个家庭群体亦是能量完形。其行动与互动构成了它的特性与本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It was instrumental, with many other entities, in the early formation of energy into physical form. We are not alone in this endeavor, for through your centuries other entities like us have also appeared and spoken.
quotes.translation: 它与许多其他存有共同参与了能量早期转化为物质形态的过程。我们并非孤军奋战，因为贯穿你们的世纪，其他像我们这样的存有也曾显现并发言。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Through him I am aware of the nature and condition of your world, and offer from my viewpoint comments meant to help you. Through Ruburt, then, I am permitted to view the earth "again" in your terms. I exist apart from him, as he exists apart from me, yet we are together a part of the same entity -- and that simply carries the idea of the psyche further.
quotes.translation: 透过他，我得以知晓你们世界的本质与状况，并从我的视角提供旨在帮助你们的评论。因此，借由鲁柏，我被允许以你们的说法"再次"审视地球。我与他各自独立存在，正如他与我各自独立存在，然而我们共同属于同一个存有的一部分——这不过是进一步延伸了心灵的概念。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 711
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Your consciousness then takes many forms, and these forms need not be alike any more, say, than a caterpillar is like a butterfly. The soul or entity has complete freedom of expression. It changes its form to suit its expression, and it forms environments like stage settings, and worlds to suit its purposes. Each setting brings forth new developments.
quotes.translation: 你们的意识因此呈现多种形态，这些形态无需彼此相似，正如毛虫与蝴蝶不必相同。灵魂或存有拥有完全的表达自由。它改变形态以适应其表达，并像搭建舞台布景般构建环境，创造世界以符合其目的。每个布景都会催生新的发展。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Moreover, there is nothing to stop it from exploring this other greater identity, or moving into it, so to speak. When this happens both identities are changed. In greater terms, the psyche or soul nowhere exists as a finished product or entity. On the other hand it is always becoming, and that becoming happens on the part of each of its own portions.
quotes.translation: 此外，没有任何事物能阻止它探索这个更伟大的本体，或说"进入"其中。当这种情况发生时，两个本体都会改变。从更宏大的视角看，心灵或灵魂在任何地方都不作为成品或存有存在。相反，它始终处于"生成"状态，而这种生成发生在它自身的每个部分之中。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In some instances this happens despite the personality's attempt to hide the weight of the past. Also on many occasions the personality escapes the problems entirely. What happens here is that the subconscious communicates with the entity through the inner senses, to the effect that the present personality is not strong enough to handle the problem.
quotes.translation: 在某些情况下，尽管人格试图隐藏过去的重量，这仍会发生。同时，在许多场合，人格完全逃避了问题。此时发生的是：潜意识通过内在感官与存有沟通，表明当前人格尚不足以处理该问题。

" I refer of course to John Bradley, entity name Philip; and John had been a witness to the 63rd session.）
quotes.translation: （这句话让我颇感意外，直到想起在1964年6月17日第63次会话第159页，赛斯曾给出一个9月2日的日期，称"计划可能在那天诞生，影响他在专业领域的参与"。我自然指的是约翰·布拉德利，其存有名为菲利普；而约翰正是第63次会话的见证者。）

quotes.text: A form is basically nonphysical. What you see of form is only that part that can be effectively active or materialized within your system of reality. So the entity in its own way possesses what you can think of as future neuronal structures. Underline that whole last sentence.
quotes.translation: 形态本质上是非物质的。你所看到的形态，只是它在你现实系统内能够有效活跃或物质化的部分。因此，存有以其自身方式拥有你可视为未来神经元结构的东西。请将最后整句话划线强调。

quotes.text: Apexes are therefore formed within each self. These apexes serve as attractions, now opened, through which the magnified potency of the entity can flow. This may appear as erratic energy, however, an analogy being sunspots. Psychologically, great ferment occurs, and often the individual personalities involved organize themselves along new lines.
quotes.translation: 因此，每个自我内部都形成了顶点。这些顶点作为吸引力，现已开启，存有被放大的潜能得以通过它们流动。这可能表现为不稳定的能量，不过可以类比为太阳黑子。心理上会发生巨大的发酵，所涉及的个人人格常常会沿着新的路线重新组织自己。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The question has to do with the so-called creation of your universe, the introduction of entities upon it, and of course with the cause or causes behind such creation. You know by now that you create your own camouflage-patterned universe, and I have tried to cover some of the mechanisms involved in this continuous, seemingly automatic creation.
quotes.translation: 这个问题与你们宇宙所谓的创造、存有被引入其中，当然还有这种创造背后的原因或多种原因有关。你们现在已知你们创造了自己伪装模式的宇宙，我也已尝试涵盖这种持续、看似自动的创造中所涉及的一些机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is difficult to explain to you in terms you can understand. I will make an analogy, which however will be imperfect. We will take reincarnation as a basis. Imagine that you have had ten reincarnations. These reincarnations all represent portions of your entity, living or experiencing sensation at various times within a physical time system.
quotes.translation: 用你们能理解的术语来解释很困难。我会打个比方，但这比喻并不完美。我们将以转世为基础。想象你有过十次转世。这些转世都代表你存有的部分，在物理时间系统内的不同时间生活或体验感觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Each consciousness, besides the material structure or material form, also possesses a psychological structure that exists in a depth and solidity in another perspective which the outer senses do no perceive. Here you will find the entity. Consciousness adopts many forms, in as many various perspectives as it is capable of manifesting itself.
quotes.translation: 每个意识，除了物质结构或物质形态外，还拥有一种心理结构，这种结构在外部感官无法感知的另一个视角中，以深度和坚固性存在。在这里你会找到存有。意识采取许多形态，在其能够显现自身的众多不同视角中呈现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Your new friend can be called Mareth, Ma-re-th, which is the name most suitable for his entity. You realize that such names are translations, as indeed all of this material is a translation of realities into conceptual patterns, and from conceptual patterns into words. It is with the words, of course, that necessary distortions must occur.
quotes.translation: 你的新朋友可以称为马雷斯，Ma-re-th，这是最适合他存有的名字。你要明白这样的名字是翻译，正如所有这些资料都是将实相翻译成概念模式，再从概念模式翻译成文字。当然，正是在文字中，必然的扭曲必须发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is very close to the entity. Largely due to its abilities are the creative processes used, but hardly understood by the ego. In many cases this supraselfis already, so to speak, moving into completely new systems. It is, of course, aware of your reincarnations on the individual's part, but these are not present nor future to the self.
quotes.translation: 它非常接近存有。很大程度上，正是由于它的能力，创造过程得以被运用，但自我几乎无法理解。在许多情况下，这个超我可以说已经进入了全新的系统。它当然知道个体层面的转世，但这些转世对自我而言既非过去也非未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In other terms, you could say that an entity visits all planes simultaneously, as it is possible for you to visit a certain state, county, and city at one time. You might also visit the states of sorrow and joy almost simultaneously, and experience both emotions in heightened form because of the almost immediate contrast between them.
quotes.translation: 用另一种说法，你可以说一个存有同时造访所有层面，就像你有可能同时造访某个州、县和市一样。你或许也几乎同时造访悲伤与喜悦的状态，并因两者之间的即时对比而体验到这两种情感的强化形式。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 713)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: （John's entity name is Philip. He has witnessed a number of sessions, the last being the 226th. Johns presence usually calls forth some telepathic and/or clairvoyant material from Seth, and so it developed this evening. The form of the material is a little different however this time, and involves John and his wife for the most part.
quotes.translation: （约翰的存有名字是菲利普。他见证过数次课程，最近一次是第226节。约翰的出现通常会引发赛斯传递一些心灵感应和/或千里眼资料，今晚也是如此。不过这次资料的形式略有不同，主要涉及约翰和他的妻子。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: On your part the king is an unknown entity, but he will make a move. You are the bishop in the game. May should see evidence of the further changes. A quality that you think of as stable now is not. In other words I would suggest that you play it cagey for now.
quotes.translation: 就你而言，国王是一个未知的存有，但他会采取行动。你是棋局中的主教。五月应该会看到进一步变化的证据。你现在认为稳定的一种品质其实并不稳定。换句话说，我建议你目前谨慎行事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: We have been speaking of dream events and waking reality, the nature of creativity and the formation of events. We have also touched upon psychological entities of vast proportions, in your terms, that form psychological structures from which your own reality emerges. In that connection, the nature of my reality becomes pertinent.
quotes.translation: 我们一直在谈论梦事件与醒时实相、创造力的本质以及事件的形成。我们也触及了那些庞大的心理存有——用你们的话说——它们形成了心理结构，你们的实相从中涌现。就此而言，我实相的本质就变得相关了。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I am aware of a different kind of experience, not linear, and can focus upon and react to an infinite variety of simultaneous events. Ruburt could not express them, and so they must be leveled out into linear expression if they are to be communicated. This ability to perceive and react to unlimited simultaneous events is a basic characteristic of each whole self or entity. Therefore, I do not claim it as some feat that is exclusively my own.
quotes.translation: 我意识到一种不同的体验，不是线性的，并且能够聚焦并回应无限多样的同时性事件。鲁柏无法表达它们，因此若要传达，它们必须被拉平为线性表达。这种感知并回应无限同时性事件的能力，是每个完整自体或存有的基本特征。因此，我并不声称这是唯独属于我的某种壮举。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You do have access to the inner self, therefore. You are hardly cut off from your own soul or entity. The ego prefers to consider itself the captain at the helm, so to speak, since it is the ego who most directly deals with the sometimes tumultuous seas of physical reality, and it does not want to be distracted from this task.
quotes.translation: 因此，你确实能接触到内在自我。你与自己的灵魂或存有并非隔绝。自我更倾向于将自己视为掌舵的船长——毕竟它直接处理物质实相那有时波涛汹涌的海面，不愿被这项任务分心。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: That includes constructing the earth itself, and when I spoke of the first particle I referred to the very first materialization of physical matter, period. It was this first particle before earth had its form to which I referred when saying that it was the result of the will of all the entities who would ever be born upon it.
quotes.translation: 这包括构建地球本身。当我谈及最初粒子时，指的是物质实相首次物质化的那个原点。正是这个在地球成形前便存在的初始粒子，被我称为所有将诞生于地球的存有们集体意志的产物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There are various types of dreams and dream fragments. I will follow this through also later, since in these beginning sessions I am giving you what may be considered a broad outline to be filled in. These dissociated states often occur in sleep, an excellent time since the ego is quieted. At such times it is extremely possible for present personalities to be visited by others such as myself, but only on the bidding of the entity itself.
quotes.translation: 梦境与梦的碎片有各种类型。我稍后也会深入探讨这点，因为在这些初始课程中，我正为你勾勒可待填充的宏观轮廓。这些解离状态常在睡眠中发生——当自我平静时，便是绝佳时机。此时，当前人格极有可能被如我这般的存在造访，但这必须经由存有本身的许可。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Again, this happened within your own system. Many entities have no need for form, in your terms, at all, but we will not be concerned with them this evening. (Pause.) This original system of which I have spoken will at least be theorized shortly, but the idea will not be taken seriously enough to cause any deep controversy.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，这发生在你们自身的系统内。用你们的术语来说，许多存有根本不需要形体，但我们今晚不会讨论它们。（停顿）我提及的这个原始系统很快至少会形成理论雏形，但这个概念不会引发足够重视以致产生深刻争议。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: John remembers subconsciously the old situation. This is partially the cause of some of the negative feelings, but there is no guilt in any (underlined) of this. No one save the individual entity knows in what directions weaknesses lie that need correction, and it sets about forming life dramas in which these can be faced.
quotes.translation: 约翰在潜意识中记得旧有的情境。这部分导致了某些负面感受，但其中绝无任何（着重强调）罪咎。除了个体存有本身，无人知晓哪些方向的弱点需要修正，于是它着手编排能直面这些弱点的生命戏剧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: However, the mental system that parallels the chromosome system carries in condensed form within the atoms generalized consciousness, data that has been transmitted to it by the entity. That is, before entry into your plane, the main characteristics of a personality have already been determined by the personality itself.
quotes.translation: 然而，与染色体系统平行的精神系统，在原子中以浓缩形式携带着由存有传递的广义意识数据。也就是说，在进入你们层面之前，人格的主要特征已由人格自身决定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Psychic identity does not need to set up barriers in order to recognize selfhoods. One personality can therefore be a portion of more than one entity, and still retain its own identity, its own individuality. Various groupings of experience exist. It is your concept of time that highly limits your idea of individuality.
quotes.translation: 心灵身份无需设立屏障来认知自我。因此，一个人格可以成为多个存有的一部分，同时仍保有其自身身份与独特性。存在各种不同的经验组合。正是你们的时间观念极大地限制了对个体性的认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is not the time for you to run willy-nilly, looking for truth in any tree- top--the truth is inside your own skull, and you at least know how to find it; but discipline and intuition is involved. Your son is not a three-year-old any longer. He is an entity older than you, and he has tried to point the way to you.
quotes.translation: 现在不是让你漫无目的地四处奔波，在每棵树梢间寻找真理——真理就在你自己的颅骨之内，你至少知道如何找到它；但这需要纪律与直觉的参与。你的儿子已不再是三岁孩童。他是一位比你年长的存有，并且一直在试图为你指明方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This inner ego knows the outer ego well. The outer ego is but a counterfeit image of the inner ego. The outer ego as a rule is not aware of what you may think of for now as the thoughts or communications of the inner ego; but the inner ego knows every step you take, every particle of air you breathe, every dream you have; and it is the source of your own personality and is the representative of the entity of which it is part.
quotes.translation: 这个内在自我深知外在自我。外在自我不过是内在自我的仿冒影像。外在自我通常意识不到你们此刻可能视为内在自我思想或沟通的内容；但内在自我知晓你迈出的每一步、呼吸的每一粒空气、所做的每一个梦；它是你人格的源头，也是它所隶属的存有的代表。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is obvious, however, that all these powers of the entity cannot be vested in its various personalities. The consciousness of a part of the whole could not hear the weight of the consciousness of the whole. Fragment personalities could not possibly contain the whole, but they do contain the seeds of the whole.
quotes.translation: 然而显而易见，存有的所有这些能力无法完全赋予其各个不同的人格。整体中某一部分的意识无法承受整体意识的重量。碎片化的人格不可能包含整体，但它们确实蕴含着整体的种子。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Your work is protected, not only because it is one of your projects, but also because in a fashion it becomes its own kind of entity--a well-intended one that exists in a rather concentrated form, distilled from your own best aspirations. Hence it is also filled with energy, and also becomes a collector of it.
quotes.translation: 你的工作受到保护，不仅因为它是你的计划之一，更因为它以某种方式形成了自己的存有形态——一个意图良善的存有，以相当浓缩的形式存在，从你最佳愿景中蒸馏而出。因此它也充满能量，并成为能量的收集者。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Had you remained apart, the sessions would not have begun. You have been connected with the same entity, though you have sprung apart from it, but the inner relationship adds to the power available. You help steady the circuit, so to speak. You also generated initial energy and impetus to help Ruburt's own.
quotes.translation: 倘若你们保持疏离，这些课程就不会开始。你们与同一个存有相连，尽管你们已从中分离而出，但内在联系增强了可用的力量。可以说，你们帮助稳定了电路。你们还产生了初始能量与动力，以协助鲁柏自身的力量。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: To the entity, your own consciousness could be likened to one stream of consciousness, in your terms. The greater part of your own identity, then, is completely aware of all of your conscious and unconscious living material. It is also aware of the same kind of data from all of (its and your) parts.
quotes.translation: 对存有而言，你们自己的意识可被比作一条意识之流（以你们的时间术语来说）。因此，你们身份中更大部分完全知晓所有意识与无意识的活素材，也知晓来自其（及你们的）所有部分的同类资料。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: There is no need to create a separate god who exists outside of your universe and separate from it, nor is there any need to think of a soul as some distant entity. God, or All That Is, is intimately a part of you. "His" energy forms your identity, and your soul is a part of you in the same manner.
quotes.translation: 无需创造一个存在于宇宙之外且与之分离的独立神祇，也无需将灵魂视为某种遥远的存有。神或一切万有，亲密地是你们的一部分。"祂"的能量构成你们的身份，而你们的灵魂以同样方式成为你们的一部分。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There is no such thing as division as far as the personality is concerned. Even a full-fledged fragment can turn into an entity in certain cases. There are no rules that hold any living thing down to one form or one kind of existence. And now, dear patient friends, I bid you a most fond good night.
quotes.translation: 就人格而言，根本不存在分裂这回事。即使一个充分发展的片段体在某些情况下也能转化为存有。没有任何规则将任何生命束缚于单一形态或单一存在方式。现在，亲爱的耐心朋友们，我向你们致以最温馨的晚安。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: But the legs do walk, and the dream universe does exist. As the entity expands and originates new personalities, and these personalities then become independent individuals, so do the individuals create dream or so-called dream realities and individuals of the dream universe, which are independent.
quotes.translation: 但双腿确实行走，梦境宇宙也确实存在。正如存有扩展并衍生新人格，这些人格继而成为独立个体，个体也创造梦境或所谓的梦境实相，以及梦境宇宙中独立的个体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There are only various planes of existence in which energy wishes, or may wish, to manifest itself. The entity then projects a personality within that plane of existence, equipping it with whatever camouflage senses, mechanisms, and protections that are necessary for survival on that plane.
quotes.translation: 只存在各种不同的存在层面，能量希望或可能希望在其中彰显自身。存有于是投射一个人格进入该存在层面，为其配备在该层面生存所必需的任何伪装感官、机制与保护。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Ruburt is only learning now not to scold and badger his subconscious. Again, all of this involves action within action. Now. It is the intuitive, spontaneous and psychically exuberant nature of Ruburt's whole entity, for one thing, that makes it possible for me to communicate with you both.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏现在才学会不责骂或纠缠他的潜意识。再次强调，这一切都涉及行动中的行动。现在。正是鲁柏整个存有的直觉性、自发性和灵性充沛的本质（仅举一例），使我得以与你们两人沟通。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: His wife chose to solve several problems this time, rather than string them out. This is a characteristic of that entity--an impatience and yet a daring, because the situation represented such a challenge. All of the weak points were intensified, hence the gravity of the physical condition.
quotes.translation: 他的妻子这次选择同时解决几个问题，而非逐一拖延。这正是该存体的特质——既显急躁又具胆识，因为此情境构成了极大挑战。所有弱点都被强化，故而身体状态如此严重。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: I will here add Joseph, that you did indeed paint an excellent likeness of me, as I was, and as my entity is. I am sure you know to what I refer.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，我在此补充说明：你确实精准描绘了我本然的面貌，以及我存体的本质。我确信你明白我所指为何。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I have told you that all consciousnesses exist in the spacious present, which is spontaneous while also durable. Then it is no contradiction to say that entities existed before the birth of your planet, though in your time it seems that new ones are being brought to consciousness.
quotes.translation: 我曾告知诸位，所有意识皆存在于广袤当下——这当下既是自发性的，又具持久性。因此，说存体在你们星球诞生前就已存在并非矛盾，尽管在你们的时间观里，似乎仍有新存体正在觉醒。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Those portions of my entity that have not had physical experience, however, do not operate within that time system, at any time (smile), if you will excuse the pun. It is not beyond them. They simply have not chosen the particular experience, nor delved into that moment point.
quotes.translation: 然而，我存体中那些未曾经历物质实相的片段，在任何时间系统内都不运作（微笑），请原谅这个双关语。这并非它们无法企及，而是它们单纯未选择特定经验，也未深入那个时间节点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Never think of it as static. There is constant give and take between all portions of the self, and the entity changes as it interacts with other levels of the personality. Any given thought experienced by you is experienced by all possible yourselves, though in various forms.
quotes.translation: 切勿视其为静止状态。自我所有片段之间持续进行着给予与接收，存体在与人格其他层面互动时亦随之改变。你所经历的任一思想，皆被所有可能的自我所经历——尽管形态各异。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The whole nature and structure of physical life as you know it, is a symbolic statement made by groups of entities who choose to work with physical symbolism. So the body is a symbol for what you are, or what you think you are -- and these may be two different things indeed.
quotes.translation: 你们所认知的物质生命之整体本质与结构，是由选择运用物质象征手法的存体群所做出的象征性陈述。因此，身体是你们本质的象征——或是你们自认为的本质，而这两者实则可能大相径庭。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The personality who sometimes speaks (Seth's larger entity), can change form at will. He was never imprisoned by believing that one personality existed within one form. To your way of thinking he would change form according to his mood; as he thinks, he is. (Emphasized.)
quotes.translation: 那个偶尔发言的人格（赛斯的较大本体）能随意改变形态。他从未被"一个形态只能存在一个人格"的信念所禁锢。用你们的思维方式来说，他会根据心情改变形态；因为他思故他在。（强调语气）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now in a very small way, admittedly, that analogy hints at the kind of deeper events that occur as selves are born out of selves to operate in various levels of activity. In the case of entities, each such self dwells entirely in its own dimension or system of reality.
quotes.translation: 诚然，这个比喻在极小的程度上暗示了更深层的事件——当自我从自我中诞生，在不同活动层面运作时，所发生的那些事件。就本体而言，每个这样的自我都完全栖居于自己的维度或实相系统中。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 692
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Probable universes are by their very nature existing universes. You mentioned that when and if you become an entity, and send forth personalities, that they would gain existence in the first periods of another such cycle; in another newer, say, fourth or fifth century.
quotes.translation: 可能宇宙就其本质而言就是存在的宇宙。你提到当你们成为本体并派出人格时，这些人格将在另一个此类周期的初期获得存在——比如在另一个较新的、所谓的第四或第五世纪。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You must remember, and this is I'm afraid a sideline: but I must communicate this data to you by words which must necessarily be strung out in order, end to end, when now to me there is no such necessity, and I will go into this further. As I began to say, I have been speaking of your plane and the personalities upon it. Now I will go into this further, into the entities involved.
quotes.translation: 你们必须记住——恐怕这是个题外话——但我必须用文字向你们传达这些资料，而这些文字必须按顺序首尾相连地排列，尽管对我而言并无此必要，这点我稍后会进一步说明。正如我开始所说，我一直在谈论你们的层面及其上的人格。现在我将进一步探讨涉及的本体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I am aware of you in many ways through Ruburt's nervous system. I am aware of you as human forms and physical entities. Through him I am aware of you as material three-dimensional forms. This is almost a second handed experience for me, however, and never too clear.
quotes.translation: 我通过鲁柏的神经系统以多种方式感知到你们。我感知到你们作为人类形态和物质实体的存在。通过他，我感知到你们作为三维物质形态的存在。然而，这对我来说几乎是二手经验，且从未清晰过。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: These make up the basic identity structure of one whole self. Again, this does not mean that the portions are not independent and individual. Also, the divisions are arbitrary to a large degree, for they can indeed be carried further, for example, to the entity.
quotes.translation: 这些构成了一个完整自我的基本身份结构。再次强调，这并不意味着各个部分不是独立且独特的。此外，这些划分在很大程度上是随意的，因为它们确实可以进一步延伸——例如，延伸到本体层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now, to begin with your dream: The entity is aware of the experiences of all of its personalities. Give us a moment ...
quotes.translation: 现在，先从你的梦说起：本体知晓其所有人格的经历。请稍等片刻……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 692
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: These psychic entities are real, however. It is quite true to say that their reality consists not only of the core of their own identity, but also is reinforced by those projected thoughts and feelings of the earthly audience for whom the drama is enacted.
quotes.translation: 然而，这些心灵本体是真实存在的。完全可以这样说，它们的真实性不仅在于自身身份的核心，更因那些为戏剧上演的人间观众所投射的思想与情感而得到强化。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: However, as I have said there is great similarity between your relationship to your dreams, and to the entity's relationship to his personality. What I did not make plain was that your dreams are part of a plane, and exist on it as you exist on your plane.
quotes.translation: 不过，正如我所说，你与梦境的关系，和本体与其人格的关系之间存在着极大的相似性。我未阐明的是，你的梦境是某个层面的一部分，并存在于该层面，正如你存在于你的层面一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: An energy gestalt maintains its individuality as a portion of All That Is. These are not impersonal energy forms. They are very highly individualized psychological entities. Their psychological development however is far different than any that you know.
quotes.translation: 能量完形作为一切万有的一部分维持着其个体性。这些并非非人格的能量形式，而是高度个体化的心理本体。然而，它们的心理发展与你所知的任何形式都截然不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: This is also responsible for the fact that it is difficult to understand how one personality, while retaining its individuality, can be a portion of more than one entity, and we will have more to say on that subject as we continue with the time concept.
quotes.translation: 这也解释了为何难以理解：一个人格如何在保持自身个体性的同时，成为多个本体的一部分。随着我们继续探讨时间概念，我们将对此主题作进一步阐述。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The last struggles of the ego will take place in these hours. It will finally understand that it is not to be dumped aside but taken along as itself, independent as always, to stand beside other independent egos that all represent facets of the entity.
quotes.translation: 自我的最后挣扎将发生在这些时刻。它终将明白，自己不会被抛弃，而是作为独立的自我被携带前行，与其他同样代表本体不同面向的独立自我并肩而立。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I had some pertinent remarks to make this evening, and since Philip (Seth's entity name for John Bradley) is indeed a friend, I shall feel free to make them, although they are somewhat of a personal nature, and directed to you and our reluctant medium.
quotes.translation: 今晚我有些切题的话要说，既然菲利普（赛斯为约翰·布拉德利取的存有名）确实是位朋友，我便畅所欲言，尽管这些话语带有个人性质，且是针对你与那位勉为其难的通灵者。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now. Existence uses form. When a planetary system is disrupted, in some cases entities who are attracted to it or consider it their home, simply change their form, regroup their forces, and if they consider it worthwhile, put the house back in order.
quotes.translation: 存在利用形态。当行星体系瓦解时，某些被其吸引或视其为家园的存有，往往只需改变形态、重组力量，若认为值得，便会将"房屋"恢复原状。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: However, the basic cooperative nature of the libido is indeed responsible, in large degree, for the psychic cooperation in which all entities are involved, in the construction of a physical world of matter that is inhabited by all on your plane.
quotes.translation: 然而，力比多本质上的合作特性，在很大程度上确实促成了所有存有参与其中的心灵协作——共同构建你们层面众生栖息的物质世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: My connection with you is obvious from our previous discussions. Ruburt and I were once intimately connected, being offshoots so to speak of the same entity. We developed according to our own abilities. I am not his subconscious nor is he mine.
quotes.translation: 从我们先前的讨论可知，我与你的关联显而易见。鲁柏与我曾紧密相连，可谓同一存有的分支。我们依各自能力发展。我非他的潜意识，他亦非我的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: With training some direction can be given, so that the information can be effectively used by the normal waking personality. With such training these experiences will lead you to other portions of your own entity. This is rather important.
quotes.translation: 经过训练可给予适当引导，使这些信息能被正常清醒人格有效运用。此类训练将引领你触及自身存有的其他部分，这相当重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: They share physical life with you therefore, whether the ego realizes this or not. After this existence the ego will not remain dormant either. It simply will not be the dominant psychological entity that it is during physical existence.
quotes.translation: 因此无论自我是否意识到，它们始终与你共享物质生命。此世结束后，自我亦不会沉睡，只是不再如物质存在期间那般作为主导心理存有。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: That will be our procedure, then. It is not possible (Pause) to thoroughly understand a time sequence without some participation in the system involved. Portions of the overall Seth entity have participated in your system, as you know.
quotes.translation: 那么，这就是我们的程序。没有对相关系统的参与，就不可能（停顿）彻底理解时间序列。如你所知，整体赛斯实体的部分曾参与过你们的系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: (Mark is Seth's entity name for Bill Macdonnel.) A child was present, hence the Nina connection again. Eve represented the nighttime as well as a name, and this led to a future possibility, a minor accident involving Mr. Mossman's Eve.
quotes.translation: （马克是赛斯为比尔·麦克唐纳取的实体名。）当时有个孩子在场，因此又联系到妮娜。伊芙既代表夜晚也代表一个名字，这引出了一个未来的可能性——涉及莫斯曼先生那辆伊芙的小事故。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now. In that respect I am closer to Ruburt than I am to you. However I have been connected with both of you in the past, and this is something for another night. And at that point of synthesization we will be part of the same entity.
quotes.translation: 现在。在这方面，我与鲁柏的关系比与你更近。然而过去我曾与你们两人都有过关联，这是另一个夜晚的话题。在综合的那个点上，我们将成为同一实体的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I will go into this also more deeply later. It is obvious by now that entities on any plane create that plane, and a strong portion of their personalities are similarly constructed to deal with the mechanics of the particular plane.
quotes.translation: 我稍后也会更深入地探讨这点。目前显而易见的是，任何层面的实体都创造了那个层面，而他们人格的强烈部分也以类似方式构建，以处理特定层面的运作机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: When you understand the construction of entities, then you will understand how this can be so. Ruburt is not myself now, in his present life; he is nevertheless an extension and materialization of the Seth that I was at one time.
quotes.translation: 当你们理解实体的构造时，就会明白为何如此。鲁柏在今生并非我本人；但他是我曾是的那个赛斯的延伸与物质化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: That's long enough. Entity is split during incarnations. Between lives whole self.
quotes.translation: 时间够长了。实体在转世期间是分裂的。在转世之间则是完整的自体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Nor is it any coincidence that the picture which you drew as a result of your vision struck him so forcibly. Roarck is the name of your acquaintance; it is the name of Jim's entity, and about this I will have more to say.
quotes.translation: 你因灵视所绘的那幅画如此强烈地触动他，这绝非偶然。Roarck是你相识者的名字，也是吉姆存有的名字，关于此事我稍后会详述。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You see, or man sees, not even half of the whole entity which is himself. It is true that in this journey and on this search, discipline, some caution and understanding, and much courage, is demanded.
quotes.translation: 你看——或者说人类所见的——甚至不及自身完整存有的一半。确实，在这趟旅程与探索中，需要纪律、审慎与理解，以及极大的勇气。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Other portions have not. The knowledge is available to all portions of the entity. The knowledge is not as direct or significant however, to those portions that have not so participated.
quotes.translation: 其他部分则不然。知识对所有存有部分都是可及的，但对那些未曾参与的部分而言，这些知识并不那么直接或重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: To you, your body is solid. The entity can perceive the room in which you sit as if your belly were a window, but it sees with inner sight, and forms the images through the inner senses.
quotes.translation: 对你而言，你的身体是坚实的。存有能感知你所在的房间，仿佛你的腹部是一扇窗，但它以内在之眼观看，并通过内在感官形成意象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: （It will be remembered that Mark is Bill MacDonnell's entity name. Bill is now in the process of transforming a downtown store into a combination art gallery and living quarters.
quotes.translation: （需记得马克是比尔·麦克唐纳的存有之名。比尔此刻正将一间市区店面改造成艺廊兼居所。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: ("I have one question. How is the entity that is about to manifest part of itself through Sue [who is due to give birth in a few weeks], preparing for the event and experience?"
quotes.translation: （"我有个问题。即将通过苏[数周后预产]显化自身部分的那个存有，如何为这场事件与体验做准备？"）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is the way that galaxies form. It is the way that the universe expands, and it is the way that entities form. Now, that is your answer. Chew that one over for a while.
quotes.translation: 这正是星系形成的方式，宇宙扩张的方式，也是存有形成的方式。现在，这就是你的答案。请好好咀嚼这个答案。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (Smile.) This is a tricky method, and I can enjoy seeing you in your terms as material entities, for Ruburt's system is carrying the prominent spot, and I use it.
quotes.translation: （微笑。）这是个棘手的方法，而我很享受以你们的角度看待你们作为物质存有的模样，因为鲁柏的系统正占据主导位置，而我正运用它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now. Some personalities can be a part of more than one entity. This is something I do not believe we have discussed before.
quotes.translation: 现在。某些人格可以同时属于多个存有。这点我相信我们之前未曾讨论过。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The entity, or the soul, has a far more creative and complicated nature than even your religions have ever granted it.
quotes.translation: 存有，或灵魂，其本质远比你们宗教所赋予的更具创造力与复杂性。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: They greet the entity as a son greets his father. There is no coercion involved here, and this is an important point.
quotes.translation: 他们迎接存有时，如同儿子迎接父亲。这里不存在任何强迫，这点至关重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The mind as I mentioned earlier is part of the inner plane. It is a mere portion of the entity itself.
quotes.translation: 如我之前所述，心智属于内在层面的一部分。它仅是存有本身的一个微小片段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json
